authors_text: Yen-Ju Lu,Zhong-Qiu Wang,Shinji Watanabe,Alexander Richard,Cheng Yu,Yu Tsao
title: Conditional Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Speech Enhancement
title_zh: 用于语音增强的条件扩散概率模型
abstract: Speech enhancement is a critical component of many user-oriented audio applications, yet current systems still suffer from distorted and unnatural outputs. While generative models have shown strong potential in speech synthesis, they are still lagging behind in speech enhancement. This work leverages recent advances in diffusion probabilistic models, and proposes a novel speech enhancement algorithm that incorporates characteristics of the observed noisy speech signal into the diffusion and reverse processes. More specifically, we propose a generalized formulation of the diffusion probabilistic model named conditional diffusion probabilistic model that, in its reverse process, can adapt to non-Gaussian real noises in the estimated speech signal. In our experiments, we demonstrate strong performance of the proposed approach compared to representative generative models, and investigate the generalization capability of our models to other datasets with noise characteristics unseen during training.
summary: Speech enhancement is a critical component of many user-oriented audio applications, yet current systems still suffer from distorted and unnatural outputs. While generative models have shown strong potential in speech synthesis, they are still lagging behind in speech enhancement. This work leverages recent advances in diffusion probabilistic models, and proposes a novel speech enhancement algorithm that incorporates characteristics of the observed noisy speech signal into the diffusion and reverse processes. More specifically, we propose a generalized formulation of the diffusion probabilistic model named conditional diffusion probabilistic model that, in its reverse process, can adapt to non-Gaussian real noises in the estimated speech signal. In our experiments, we demonstrate strong performance of the proposed approach compared to representative generative models, and investigate the generalization capability of our models to other datasets with noise characteristics unseen during training.
abstract_zh: 语音增强是许多面向用户的音频应用的关键组成部分，但当前系统仍然存在输出失真和不自然的问题。虽然生成模型在语音合成方面显示出强大的潜力，但它们在语音增强方面仍然落后。这项工作利用扩散概率模型的最新进展，提出了一种新颖的语音增强算法，该算法将观察到的噪声语音信号的特征纳入扩散和逆过程。更具体地说，我们提出了一种名为条件扩散概率模型的扩散概率模型的广义公式，在其逆过程中，可以适应估计语音信号中的非高斯真实噪声。在我们的实验中，与代表性生成模型相比，我们展示了所提出的方法的强大性能，并研究了我们的模型对训练期间未见的噪声特征的其他数据集的泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于条件扩散概率模型的语音增强算法，以解决现有系统中语音失真和不自然的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有语音增强系统存在输出失真和不自然的问题，生成模型在语音增强任务中表现不足，需改进方法以适应真实噪声并提升效果。
AI.method: 提出条件扩散概率模型，将噪声语音信号特征融入扩散与反向过程，反向过程可适应非高斯真实噪声。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在语音增强任务中优于现有生成模型，并具备对未见噪声数据集的泛化能力。
AI.conclusion: 条件扩散概率模型有效提升了语音增强效果，为相关应用提供了新方法。

search_text: Conditional Diffusion Probabilistic Model for Speech Enhancement 用于语音增强的条件扩散概率模型 Speech enhancement is a critical component of many user-oriented audio applications, yet current systems still suffer from distorted and unnatural outputs. While generative models have shown strong potential in speech synthesis, they are still lagging behind in speech enhancement. This work leverages recent advances in diffusion probabilistic models, and proposes a novel speech enhancement algorithm that incorporates characteristics of the observed noisy speech signal into the diffusion and reverse processes. More specifically, we propose a generalized formulation of the diffusion probabilistic model named conditional diffusion probabilistic model that, in its reverse process, can adapt to non-Gaussian real noises in the estimated speech signal. In our experiments, we demonstrate strong performance of the proposed approach compared to representative generative models, and investigate the generalization capability of our models to other datasets with noise characteristics unseen during training. 语音增强是许多面向用户的音频应用的关键组成部分，但当前系统仍然存在输出失真和不自然的问题。虽然生成模型在语音合成方面显示出强大的潜力，但它们在语音增强方面仍然落后。这项工作利用扩散概率模型的最新进展，提出了一种新颖的语音增强算法，该算法将观察到的噪声语音信号的特征纳入扩散和逆过程。更具体地说，我们提出了一种名为条件扩散概率模型的扩散概率模型的广义公式，在其逆过程中，可以适应估计语音信号中的非高斯真实噪声。在我们的实验中，与代表性生成模型相比，我们展示了所提出的方法的强大性能，并研究了我们的模型对训练期间未见的噪声特征的其他数据集的泛化能力。 提出一种基于条件扩散概率模型的语音增强算法，以解决现有系统中语音失真和不自然的问题。 Yen-Ju Lu,Zhong-Qiu Wang,Shinji Watanabe,Alexander Richard,Cheng Yu,Yu Tsao eess.AS,cs.LG,cs.SD

authors_text: You Zhang,Ge Zhu,Zhiyao Duan
title: A Probabilistic Fusion Framework for Spoofing Aware Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于欺骗感知说话人验证的概率融合框架
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures, to be appear in Odyssey 2022
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures, to be appear in Odyssey 2022
abstract: The performance of automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems could be degraded by voice spoofing attacks. Most existing works aimed to develop standalone spoofing countermeasure (CM) systems. Relatively little work targeted at developing an integrated spoofing aware speaker verification (SASV) system. In the recent SASV challenge, the organizers encourage the development of such integration by releasing official protocols and baselines. In this paper, we build a probabilistic framework for fusing the ASV and CM subsystem scores. We further propose fusion strategies for direct inference and fine-tuning to predict the SASV score based on the framework. Surprisingly, these strategies significantly improve the SASV equal error rate (EER) from 19.31% of the baseline to 1.53% on the official evaluation trials of the SASV challenge. We verify the effectiveness of our proposed components through ablation studies and provide insights with score distribution analysis.
summary: The performance of automatic speaker verification (ASV) systems could be degraded by voice spoofing attacks. Most existing works aimed to develop standalone spoofing countermeasure (CM) systems. Relatively little work targeted at developing an integrated spoofing aware speaker verification (SASV) system. In the recent SASV challenge, the organizers encourage the development of such integration by releasing official protocols and baselines. In this paper, we build a probabilistic framework for fusing the ASV and CM subsystem scores. We further propose fusion strategies for direct inference and fine-tuning to predict the SASV score based on the framework. Surprisingly, these strategies significantly improve the SASV equal error rate (EER) from 19.31% of the baseline to 1.53% on the official evaluation trials of the SASV challenge. We verify the effectiveness of our proposed components through ablation studies and provide insights with score distribution analysis.
abstract_zh: 自动说话人验证 (ASV) 系统的性能可能会因语音欺骗攻击而降低。大多数现有工作旨在开发独立的欺骗对策（CM）系统。针对开发集成欺骗感知说话人验证 (SASV) 系统的工作相对较少。在最近的 SASV 挑战中，组织者通过发布官方协议和基线来鼓励这种集成的发展。在本文中，我们构建了一个融合 ASV 和 CM 子系统分数的概率框架。我们进一步提出了直接推理和微调的融合策略，以基于该框架预测 SASV 分数。令人惊讶的是，在 SASV 挑战的官方评估试验中，这些策略将 SASV 等错误率 (EER) 从基线的 19.31% 显着提高到 1.53%。我们通过消融研究验证了我们提出的组件的有效性，并通过分数分布分析提供了见解。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种概率融合框架，通过整合说话人验证（ASV）和反欺骗（CM）子系统得分，构建更鲁棒的防欺骗说话人验证（SASV）系统。
AI.motivation: 现有研究多关注独立的反欺骗系统，而对集成式SASV系统研究不足。SASV挑战赛鼓励开发此类集成方案，因此需探索更有效的ASV与CM得分融合方法。
AI.method: 设计概率框架融合ASV和CM得分，并提出直接推理与微调策略，通过官方评估数据验证框架有效性，结合消融实验与得分分布分析提供理论支持。
AI.result: 在SASV挑战赛官方测试集上，系统EER从基线19.31%显著降至1.53%，验证了融合策略的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 概率融合框架及优化策略能有效提升SASV性能，为防欺骗验证提供新思路，未来可进一步探索更复杂的融合机制与场景适应性。

authors_text: Olivier Bousquet,Amit Daniely,Haim Kaplan,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Uri Stemmer
title: Monotone Learning
title_zh: 单调学习
comment: Fixed a calculation error in Lemma 2.5
comments: Fixed a calculation error in Lemma 2.5
abstract: The amount of training-data is one of the key factors which determines the generalization capacity of learning algorithms. Intuitively, one expects the error rate to decrease as the amount of training-data increases. Perhaps surprisingly, natural attempts to formalize this intuition give rise to interesting and challenging mathematical questions. For example, in their classical book on pattern recognition, Devroye, Gyorfi, and Lugosi (1996) ask whether there exists a {monotone} Bayes-consistent algorithm. This question remained open for over 25 years, until recently Pestov (2021) resolved it for binary classification, using an intricate construction of a monotone Bayes-consistent algorithm. We derive a general result in multiclass classification, showing that every learning algorithm A can be transformed to a monotone one with similar performance. Further, the transformation is efficient and only uses a black-box oracle access to A. This demonstrates that one can provably avoid non-monotonic behaviour without compromising performance, thus answering questions asked by Devroye et al (1996), Viering, Mey, and Loog (2019), Viering and Loog (2021), and by Mhammedi (2021). Our transformation readily implies monotone learners in a variety of contexts: for example it extends Pestov's result to classification tasks with an arbitrary number of labels. This is in contrast with Pestov's work which is tailored to binary classification. In addition, we provide uniform bounds on the error of the monotone algorithm. This makes our transformation applicable in distribution-free settings. For example, in PAC learning it implies that every learnable class admits a monotone PAC learner. This resolves questions by Viering, Mey, and Loog (2019); Viering and Loog (2021); Mhammedi (2021).
summary: The amount of training-data is one of the key factors which determines the generalization capacity of learning algorithms. Intuitively, one expects the error rate to decrease as the amount of training-data increases. Perhaps surprisingly, natural attempts to formalize this intuition give rise to interesting and challenging mathematical questions. For example, in their classical book on pattern recognition, Devroye, Gyorfi, and Lugosi (1996) ask whether there exists a {monotone} Bayes-consistent algorithm. This question remained open for over 25 years, until recently Pestov (2021) resolved it for binary classification, using an intricate construction of a monotone Bayes-consistent algorithm. We derive a general result in multiclass classification, showing that every learning algorithm A can be transformed to a monotone one with similar performance. Further, the transformation is efficient and only uses a black-box oracle access to A. This demonstrates that one can provably avoid non-monotonic behaviour without compromising performance, thus answering questions asked by Devroye et al (1996), Viering, Mey, and Loog (2019), Viering and Loog (2021), and by Mhammedi (2021). Our transformation readily implies monotone learners in a variety of contexts: for example it extends Pestov's result to classification tasks with an arbitrary number of labels. This is in contrast with Pestov's work which is tailored to binary classification. In addition, we provide uniform bounds on the error of the monotone algorithm. This makes our transformation applicable in distribution-free settings. For example, in PAC learning it implies that every learnable class admits a monotone PAC learner. This resolves questions by Viering, Mey, and Loog (2019); Viering and Loog (2021); Mhammedi (2021).
abstract_zh: 训练数据量是决定学习算法泛化能力的关键因素之一。直观上，人们预计错误率会随着训练数据量的增加而降低。也许令人惊讶的是，将这种直觉形式化的自然尝试会产生有趣且具有挑战性的数学问题。例如，在他们关于模式识别的经典著作中，Devroye、Gyorfi 和 Lugosi (1996) 询问是否存在{单调}贝叶斯一致算法。这个问题持续了 25 年多，直到最近 Pestov (2021) 使用单调贝叶斯一致算法的复杂结构解决了它的二元分类问题。我们得出了多类分类的一般结果，表明每种学习算法 A 都可以转换为具有相似性能的单调算法。此外，该转换是高效的，并且仅使用对 A 的黑盒预言机访问。这表明可以在不影响性能的情况下避免非单调行为，从而回答 Devroye 等人 (1996)、Viering、Mey 和 Loog (2019)、Viering 和 Loog (2021) 以及 Mhammedi (2021) 提出的问题。我们的转换很容易暗示各种上下文中的单调学习器：例如，它将 Pestov 的结果扩展到具有任意数量标签的分类任务。这与 Pestov 专为二元分类而设计的工作形成鲜明对比。此外，我们还为单调算法的误差提供了统一的界限。这使得我们的转换适用于无分发的环境。例如，在 PAC 学习中，这意味着每个可学习的课程都承认一个单调的 PAC 学习者。这解决了 Viering、Mey 和 Loog (2019) 提出的问题；维林和卢格 (2021)；穆罕默德 (2021)。

AI.tldr: 本文研究多类分类中的单调学习问题，提出一种通用方法将任意学习算法转换为保持性能的单调版本。
AI.motivation: 传统学习算法的错误率随训练数据增加而降低的直觉难以形式化，且长期存在是否存在的单调贝叶斯一致算法的疑问。
AI.method: 设计一种高效转换方法，通过黑盒访问原算法并构造单调版本，同时提供统一的错误界保证。
AI.result: 证明所有学习算法均可转换为单调版本，适用于多类分类及分布无关场景（如PAC学习），解决多个长期未决问题。
AI.conclusion: 单调学习无需牺牲性能，可广泛应用于多标签分类等场景，理论证明了其普适性与有效性。

method: 设计一种高效转换方法，通过黑盒访问原算法并构造单调版本，同时提供统一的错误界保证。
result: 证明所有学习算法均可转换为单调版本，适用于多类分类及分布无关场景（如PAC学习），解决多个长期未决问题。
conclusion: 单调学习无需牺牲性能，可广泛应用于多标签分类等场景，理论证明了其普适性与有效性。
search_text: Monotone Learning 单调学习 The amount of training-data is one of the key factors which determines the generalization capacity of learning algorithms. Intuitively, one expects the error rate to decrease as the amount of training-data increases. Perhaps surprisingly, natural attempts to formalize this intuition give rise to interesting and challenging mathematical questions. For example, in their classical book on pattern recognition, Devroye, Gyorfi, and Lugosi (1996) ask whether there exists a {monotone} Bayes-consistent algorithm. This question remained open for over 25 years, until recently Pestov (2021) resolved it for binary classification, using an intricate construction of a monotone Bayes-consistent algorithm. We derive a general result in multiclass classification, showing that every learning algorithm A can be transformed to a monotone one with similar performance. Further, the transformation is efficient and only uses a black-box oracle access to A. This demonstrates that one can provably avoid non-monotonic behaviour without compromising performance, thus answering questions asked by Devroye et al (1996), Viering, Mey, and Loog (2019), Viering and Loog (2021), and by Mhammedi (2021). Our transformation readily implies monotone learners in a variety of contexts: for example it extends Pestov's result to classification tasks with an arbitrary number of labels. This is in contrast with Pestov's work which is tailored to binary classification. In addition, we provide uniform bounds on the error of the monotone algorithm. This makes our transformation applicable in distribution-free settings. For example, in PAC learning it implies that every learnable class admits a monotone PAC learner. This resolves questions by Viering, Mey, and Loog (2019); Viering and Loog (2021); Mhammedi (2021). 训练数据量是决定学习算法泛化能力的关键因素之一。直观上，人们预计错误率会随着训练数据量的增加而降低。也许令人惊讶的是，将这种直觉形式化的自然尝试会产生有趣且具有挑战性的数学问题。例如，在他们关于模式识别的经典著作中，Devroye、Gyorfi 和 Lugosi (1996) 询问是否存在{单调}贝叶斯一致算法。这个问题持续了 25 年多，直到最近 Pestov (2021) 使用单调贝叶斯一致算法的复杂结构解决了它的二元分类问题。我们得出了多类分类的一般结果，表明每种学习算法 A 都可以转换为具有相似性能的单调算法。此外，该转换是高效的，并且仅使用对 A 的黑盒预言机访问。这表明可以在不影响性能的情况下避免非单调行为，从而回答 Devroye 等人 (1996)、Viering、Mey 和 Loog (2019)、Viering 和 Loog (2021) 以及 Mhammedi (2021) 提出的问题。我们的转换很容易暗示各种上下文中的单调学习器：例如，它将 Pestov 的结果扩展到具有任意数量标签的分类任务。这与 Pestov 专为二元分类而设计的工作形成鲜明对比。此外，我们还为单调算法的误差提供了统一的界限。这使得我们的转换适用于无分发的环境。例如，在 PAC 学习中，这意味着每个可学习的课程都承认一个单调的 PAC 学习者。这解决了 Viering、Mey 和 Loog (2019) 提出的问题；维林和卢格 (2021)；穆罕默德 (2021)。 本文研究多类分类中的单调学习问题，提出一种通用方法将任意学习算法转换为保持性能的单调版本。 Olivier Bousquet,Amit Daniely,Haim Kaplan,Yishay Mansour,Shay Moran,Uri Stemmer cs.LG,cs.AI,cs.IT,math.ST

authors_text: Xingyu Liu,Deepak Pathak,Kris M. Kitani
title: REvolveR: Continuous Evolutionary Models for Robot-to-robot Policy Transfer
title_zh: REvolveR：机器人到机器人策略转移的连续进化模型
abstract: A popular paradigm in robotic learning is to train a policy from scratch for every new robot. This is not only inefficient but also often impractical for complex robots. In this work, we consider the problem of transferring a policy across two different robots with significantly different parameters such as kinematics and morphology. Existing approaches that train a new policy by matching the action or state transition distribution, including imitation learning methods, fail due to optimal action and/or state distribution being mismatched in different robots. In this paper, we propose a novel method named $REvolveR$ of using continuous evolutionary models for robotic policy transfer implemented in a physics simulator. We interpolate between the source robot and the target robot by finding a continuous evolutionary change of robot parameters. An expert policy on the source robot is transferred through training on a sequence of intermediate robots that gradually evolve into the target robot. Experiments on a physics simulator show that the proposed continuous evolutionary model can effectively transfer the policy across robots and achieve superior sample efficiency on new robots. The proposed method is especially advantageous in sparse reward settings where exploration can be significantly reduced. Code is released at https://github.com/xingyul/revolver.
summary: A popular paradigm in robotic learning is to train a policy from scratch for every new robot. This is not only inefficient but also often impractical for complex robots. In this work, we consider the problem of transferring a policy across two different robots with significantly different parameters such as kinematics and morphology. Existing approaches that train a new policy by matching the action or state transition distribution, including imitation learning methods, fail due to optimal action and/or state distribution being mismatched in different robots. In this paper, we propose a novel method named $REvolveR$ of using continuous evolutionary models for robotic policy transfer implemented in a physics simulator. We interpolate between the source robot and the target robot by finding a continuous evolutionary change of robot parameters. An expert policy on the source robot is transferred through training on a sequence of intermediate robots that gradually evolve into the target robot. Experiments on a physics simulator show that the proposed continuous evolutionary model can effectively transfer the policy across robots and achieve superior sample efficiency on new robots. The proposed method is especially advantageous in sparse reward settings where exploration can be significantly reduced. Code is released at https://github.com/xingyul/revolver.
abstract_zh: 机器人学习的一个流行范例是为每个新机器人从头开始训练策略。这不仅效率低下，而且对于复杂的机器人来说往往不切实际。在这项工作中，我们考虑在两个具有显着不同参数（例如运动学和形态学）的不同机器人之间转移策略的问题。通过匹配动作或状态转换分布来训练新策略的现有方法（包括模仿学习方法）由于不同机器人中的最佳动作和/或状态分布不匹配而失败。在本文中，我们提出了一种名为 $REvolveR$ 的新颖方法，该方法使用连续进化模型在物理模拟器中实现机器人策略转移。我们通过寻找机器人参数的连续进化变化来在源机器人和目标机器人之间进行插值。源机器人的专家策略通过对一系列中间机器人的训练来传递，这些中间机器人逐渐演化为目标机器人。物理模拟器上的实验表明，所提出的连续进化模型可以有效地在机器人之间转移策略，并在新机器人上实现卓越的样本效率。所提出的方法在可以显着减少探索的稀疏奖励设置中特别有利。代码发布于 https://github.com/xingyul/revolver。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为REvolveR的连续进化模型方法，用于在不同参数的机器人之间进行策略迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统方法为每个新机器人从头训练策略效率低下且不现实，现有迁移方法因动作或状态分布不匹配而失效。
AI.method: 通过连续进化模型在物理模拟器中实现机器人参数的渐进演化，利用中间机器人序列逐步迁移源机器人专家策略。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法能有效跨机器人迁移策略，在稀疏奖励场景下显著提升样本效率。
AI.conclusion: REvolveR为复杂机器人间的策略迁移提供了新颖且高效的解决方案。

authors_text: Benedek Rozemberczki,Charles Tapley Hoyt,Anna Gogleva,Piotr Grabowski,Klas Karis,Andrej Lamov,Andriy Nikolov,Sebastian Nilsson,Michael Ughetto,Yu Wang,Tyler Derr,Benjamin M Gyori
title: ChemicalX: A Deep Learning Library for Drug Pair Scoring
title_zh: ChemicalX：用于药物对评分的深度学习库
abstract: In this paper, we introduce ChemicalX, a PyTorch-based deep learning library designed for providing a range of state of the art models to solve the drug pair scoring task. The primary objective of the library is to make deep drug pair scoring models accessible to machine learning researchers and practitioners in a streamlined framework.The design of ChemicalX reuses existing high level model training utilities, geometric deep learning, and deep chemistry layers from the PyTorch ecosystem. Our system provides neural network layers, custom pair scoring architectures, data loaders, and batch iterators for end users. We showcase these features with example code snippets and case studies to highlight the characteristics of ChemicalX. A range of experiments on real world drug-drug interaction, polypharmacy side effect, and combination synergy prediction tasks demonstrate that the models available in ChemicalX are effective at solving the pair scoring task. Finally, we show that ChemicalX could be used to train and score machine learning models on large drug pair datasets with hundreds of thousands of compounds on commodity hardware.
summary: In this paper, we introduce ChemicalX, a PyTorch-based deep learning library designed for providing a range of state of the art models to solve the drug pair scoring task. The primary objective of the library is to make deep drug pair scoring models accessible to machine learning researchers and practitioners in a streamlined framework.The design of ChemicalX reuses existing high level model training utilities, geometric deep learning, and deep chemistry layers from the PyTorch ecosystem. Our system provides neural network layers, custom pair scoring architectures, data loaders, and batch iterators for end users. We showcase these features with example code snippets and case studies to highlight the characteristics of ChemicalX. A range of experiments on real world drug-drug interaction, polypharmacy side effect, and combination synergy prediction tasks demonstrate that the models available in ChemicalX are effective at solving the pair scoring task. Finally, we show that ChemicalX could be used to train and score machine learning models on large drug pair datasets with hundreds of thousands of compounds on commodity hardware.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们介绍了 ChemicalX，这是一个基于 PyTorch 的深度学习库，旨在提供一系列最先进的模型来解决药物对评分任务。该库的主要目标是使机器学习研究人员和从业人员能够在简化的框架中访问深度药物对评分模型。ChemicalX 的设计重用了 PyTorch 生态系统中现有的高级模型训练实用程序、几何深度学习和深度化学层。我们的系统为最终用户提供神经网络层、自定义配对评分架构、数据加载器和批量迭代器。我们通过示例代码片段和案例研究来展示这些功能，以突出 ChemicalX 的特征。一系列关于现实世界药物相互作用、复方药物副作用和组合协同预测任务的实验表明，ChemicalX 中可用的模型可以有效解决配对评分任务。最后，我们展示了 ChemicalX 可用于在商用硬件上包含数十万种化合物的大型药物对数据集上训练和评分机器学习模型。

AI.tldr: 本文介绍了一个基于PyTorch的深度学习库ChemicalX，用于解决药物对评分任务。
AI.motivation: 旨在为机器学习研究者和从业者提供一种便捷的框架，以访问先进的深度药物对评分模型。
AI.method: 利用PyTorch生态系统中的现有工具，结合几何深度学习和深度化学层，构建包含神经网络层、数据加载器和批量迭代器的系统。
AI.result: 实验表明，ChemicalX在药物相互作用、多药副作用和组合协同预测任务中表现有效，且能在普通硬件上处理大规模药物对数据集。
AI.conclusion: ChemicalX为训练和评估药物对机器学习模型提供了高效且可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Qing Jin,Jian Ren,Richard Zhuang,Sumant Hanumante,Zhengang Li,Zhiyu Chen,Yanzhi Wang,Kaiyuan Yang,Sergey Tulyakov
title: F8Net: Fixed-Point 8-bit Only Multiplication for Network Quantization
title_zh: F8Net：用于网络量化的定点 8 位乘法
abstract: Neural network quantization is a promising compression technique to reduce memory footprint and save energy consumption, potentially leading to real-time inference. However, there is a performance gap between quantized and full-precision models. To reduce it, existing quantization approaches require high-precision INT32 or full-precision multiplication during inference for scaling or dequantization. This introduces a noticeable cost in terms of memory, speed, and required energy. To tackle these issues, we present F8Net, a novel quantization framework consisting of only fixed-point 8-bit multiplication. To derive our method, we first discuss the advantages of fixed-point multiplication with different formats of fixed-point numbers and study the statistical behavior of the associated fixed-point numbers. Second, based on the statistical and algorithmic analysis, we apply different fixed-point formats for weights and activations of different layers. We introduce a novel algorithm to automatically determine the right format for each layer during training. Third, we analyze a previous quantization algorithm -- parameterized clipping activation (PACT) -- and reformulate it using fixed-point arithmetic. Finally, we unify the recently proposed method for quantization fine-tuning and our fixed-point approach to show the potential of our method. We verify F8Net on ImageNet for MobileNet V1/V2 and ResNet18/50. Our approach achieves comparable and better performance, when compared not only to existing quantization techniques with INT32 multiplication or floating-point arithmetic, but also to the full-precision counterparts, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
summary: Neural network quantization is a promising compression technique to reduce memory footprint and save energy consumption, potentially leading to real-time inference. However, there is a performance gap between quantized and full-precision models. To reduce it, existing quantization approaches require high-precision INT32 or full-precision multiplication during inference for scaling or dequantization. This introduces a noticeable cost in terms of memory, speed, and required energy. To tackle these issues, we present F8Net, a novel quantization framework consisting of only fixed-point 8-bit multiplication. To derive our method, we first discuss the advantages of fixed-point multiplication with different formats of fixed-point numbers and study the statistical behavior of the associated fixed-point numbers. Second, based on the statistical and algorithmic analysis, we apply different fixed-point formats for weights and activations of different layers. We introduce a novel algorithm to automatically determine the right format for each layer during training. Third, we analyze a previous quantization algorithm -- parameterized clipping activation (PACT) -- and reformulate it using fixed-point arithmetic. Finally, we unify the recently proposed method for quantization fine-tuning and our fixed-point approach to show the potential of our method. We verify F8Net on ImageNet for MobileNet V1/V2 and ResNet18/50. Our approach achieves comparable and better performance, when compared not only to existing quantization techniques with INT32 multiplication or floating-point arithmetic, but also to the full-precision counterparts, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
abstract_zh: 神经网络量化是一种很有前途的压缩技术，可以减少内存占用并节省能源消耗，从而有可能实现实时推理。然而，量化模型和全精度模型之间存在性能差距。为了减少这种情况，现有的量化方法在缩放或反量化的推理过程中需要高精度 INT32 或全精度乘法。这在内存、速度和所需能量方面带来了显着的成本。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 F8Net，这是一种仅由定点 8 位乘法组成的新颖量化框架。为了推导出我们的方法，我们首先讨论不同格式的定点数的定点乘法的优点，并研究相关定点数的统计行为。其次，基于统计和算法分析，我们对不同层的权重和激活应用不同的定点格式。我们引入了一种新颖的算法，可以在训练期间自动确定每一层的正确格式。第三，我们分析了以前的量化算法——参数化限幅激活（PACT）——并使用定点算法重新表述它。最后，我们将最近提出的量化微调方法和我们的定点方法结合起来，以展示我们方法的潜力。我们在 ImageNet 上针对 MobileNet V1/V2 和 ResNet18/50 验证 F8Net。我们的方法不仅与使用 INT32 乘法或浮点运算的现有量化技术相比，而且与全精度对应技术相比，实现了可比且更好的性能，从而实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出F8Net量化框架，仅使用固定点8位乘法实现网络量化，以缩小量化模型与全精度模型的性能差距。
AI.motivation: 现有量化方法在推理时需依赖高精度INT32或浮点乘法进行缩放/反量化，导致内存、速度和能耗开销较大，亟需更高效的量化方案。
AI.method: 分析不同固定点数格式的优势及统计特性，为不同层的权重和激活值分配最优固定点格式；设计训练时自动确定格式的算法；基于固定点运算重构PACT激活函数，并融合量化微调方法。
AI.result: 在ImageNet数据集上，MobileNet V1/V2和ResNet18/50模型的量化效果优于现有INT32乘法或浮点运算方法，且达到全精度模型的性能水平。
AI.conclusion: F8Net通过纯8位固定点乘法实现高效量化，在保持性能的同时显著降低计算成本，为实时推理提供了可行方案。

authors_text: Xuechen Liu,Md Sahidullah,Tomi Kinnunen
title: Learnable Nonlinear Compression for Robust Speaker Verification
title_zh: 用于鲁棒扬声器验证的可学习非线性压缩
abstract: In this study, we focus on nonlinear compression methods in spectral features for speaker verification based on deep neural network. We consider different kinds of channel-dependent (CD) nonlinear compression methods optimized in a data-driven manner. Our methods are based on power nonlinearities and dynamic range compression (DRC). We also propose multi-regime (MR) design on the nonlinearities, at improving robustness. Results on VoxCeleb1 and VoxMovies data demonstrate improvements brought by proposed compression methods over both the commonly-used logarithm and their static counterparts, especially for ones based on power function. While CD generalization improves performance on VoxCeleb1, MR provides more robustness on VoxMovies, with a maximum relative equal error rate reduction of 21.6%.
summary: In this study, we focus on nonlinear compression methods in spectral features for speaker verification based on deep neural network. We consider different kinds of channel-dependent (CD) nonlinear compression methods optimized in a data-driven manner. Our methods are based on power nonlinearities and dynamic range compression (DRC). We also propose multi-regime (MR) design on the nonlinearities, at improving robustness. Results on VoxCeleb1 and VoxMovies data demonstrate improvements brought by proposed compression methods over both the commonly-used logarithm and their static counterparts, especially for ones based on power function. While CD generalization improves performance on VoxCeleb1, MR provides more robustness on VoxMovies, with a maximum relative equal error rate reduction of 21.6%.
abstract_zh: 在本研究中，我们重点研究基于深度神经网络的说话人验证频谱特征的非线性压缩方法。我们考虑以数据驱动方式优化的不同类型的通道相关（CD）非线性压缩方法。我们的方法基于功率非线性和动态范围压缩 (DRC)。我们还提出了非线性的多机制（MR）设计，以提高鲁棒性。 VoxCeleb1 和 VoxMovies 数据的结果表明，所提出的压缩方法相对于常用的对数及其静态对应方法带来了改进，尤其是基于幂函数的压缩方法。 CD 泛化提高了 VoxCeleb1 的性能，而 MR 在 VoxMovies 上提供了更强的鲁棒性，最大相对等错误率降低了 21.6%。

AI.tldr: 本文研究基于深度神经网络的谱特征非线性压缩方法，以提升说话人验证的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 传统对数压缩方法在说话人验证中存在局限性，需探索数据驱动的非线性压缩方法以增强模型在不同场景下的适应性。
AI.method: 提出通道依赖（CD）非线性压缩方法，结合幂函数非线性和动态范围压缩（DRC），并设计多区域（MR）策略以提升鲁棒性。
AI.result: 在VoxCeleb1和VoxMovies数据集上，所提方法相较传统对数压缩及静态方法显著提升性能，其中MR策略在VoxMovies上实现最大21.6%的等错误率相对降低。
AI.conclusion: 通道依赖与多区域设计的非线性压缩方法有效提升了说话人验证的鲁棒性，尤其在复杂场景下表现优于传统方法。

authors_text: Peter Sullivan,Toshiko Shibano,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed
title: Improving Automatic Speech Recognition for Non-Native English with Transfer Learning and Language Model Decoding
title_zh: 通过迁移学习和语言模型解码改进非母语英语的自动语音识别
comment: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.00678
comments: arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2110.00678
abstract: ASR systems designed for native English (L1) usually underperform on non-native English (L2). To address this performance gap, \textbf{(i)} we extend our previous work to investigate fine-tuning of a pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 model \cite{baevski2020wav2vec,xu2021self} under a rich set of L1 and L2 training conditions. We further \textbf{(ii)} incorporate language model decoding in the ASR system, along with the fine-tuning method. Quantifying gains acquired from each of these two approaches separately and an error analysis allows us to identify different sources of improvement within our models. We find that while the large self-trained wav2vec 2.0 may be internalizing sufficient decoding knowledge for clean L1 speech \cite{xu2021self}, this does not hold for L2 speech and accounts for the utility of employing language model decoding on L2 data.
summary: ASR systems designed for native English (L1) usually underperform on non-native English (L2). To address this performance gap, \textbf{(i)} we extend our previous work to investigate fine-tuning of a pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 model \cite{baevski2020wav2vec,xu2021self} under a rich set of L1 and L2 training conditions. We further \textbf{(ii)} incorporate language model decoding in the ASR system, along with the fine-tuning method. Quantifying gains acquired from each of these two approaches separately and an error analysis allows us to identify different sources of improvement within our models. We find that while the large self-trained wav2vec 2.0 may be internalizing sufficient decoding knowledge for clean L1 speech \cite{xu2021self}, this does not hold for L2 speech and accounts for the utility of employing language model decoding on L2 data.
abstract_zh: 为母语英语 (L1) 设计的 ASR 系统通常在非母语英语 (L2) 上表现不佳。为了解决这一性能差距，\textbf{(i)}我们扩展了之前的工作，研究在丰富的 L1 和 L2 训练条件下对预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型 \cite{baevski2020wav2vec,xu2021self} 进行微调。我们进一步将语言模型解码以及微调方法合并到 ASR 系统中。分别量化从这两种方法中获得的收益和误差分析使我们能够识别模型中不同的改进来源。我们发现，虽然大型自训练 wav2vec 2.0 可能会内化干净 L1 语音的足够解码知识 \cite{xu2021self}，但这不适用于 L2 语音，并且解释了在 L2 数据上采用语言模型解码的效用。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在通过迁移学习和语言模型解码技术提升非英语母语者自动语音识别（ASR）系统的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有的英语母语（L1）ASR系统在处理非母语（L2）英语时表现不佳，存在显著的性能差距，需针对性优化。
AI.method: （i）扩展先前研究，对预训练的wav2vec 2.0模型在多种L1和L2训练条件下进行微调；（ii）结合语言模型解码技术，分别量化两种方法的改进效果并进行错误分析。
AI.result: 微调后的wav2vec 2.0模型在L1清晰语音中表现良好，但对L2语音效果不足，而引入语言模型解码能有效弥补L2语音识别的缺陷。
AI.conclusion: 迁移学习与语言模型解码的结合可显著提升非母语英语ASR系统的性能，尤其在处理L2语音时具有重要价值。

ai_content.tldr: 本文旨在通过迁移学习和语言模型解码技术提升非英语母语者自动语音识别（ASR）系统的性能。
ai_content.motivation: 现有的英语母语（L1）ASR系统在处理非母语（L2）英语时表现不佳，存在显著的性能差距，需针对性优化。
ai_content.method: （i）扩展先前研究，对预训练的wav2vec 2.0模型在多种L1和L2训练条件下进行微调；（ii）结合语言模型解码技术，分别量化两种方法的改进效果并进行错误分析。
ai_content.result: 微调后的wav2vec 2.0模型在L1清晰语音中表现良好，但对L2语音效果不足，而引入语言模型解码能有效弥补L2语音识别的缺陷。
ai_content.conclusion: 迁移学习与语言模型解码的结合可显著提升非母语英语ASR系统的性能，尤其在处理L2语音时具有重要价值。

search_text: Improving Automatic Speech Recognition for Non-Native English with Transfer Learning and Language Model Decoding 通过迁移学习和语言模型解码改进非母语英语的自动语音识别 ASR systems designed for native English (L1) usually underperform on non-native English (L2). To address this performance gap, \textbf{(i)} we extend our previous work to investigate fine-tuning of a pre-trained wav2vec 2.0 model \cite{baevski2020wav2vec,xu2021self} under a rich set of L1 and L2 training conditions. We further \textbf{(ii)} incorporate language model decoding in the ASR system, along with the fine-tuning method. Quantifying gains acquired from each of these two approaches separately and an error analysis allows us to identify different sources of improvement within our models. We find that while the large self-trained wav2vec 2.0 may be internalizing sufficient decoding knowledge for clean L1 speech \cite{xu2021self}, this does not hold for L2 speech and accounts for the utility of employing language model decoding on L2 data. 为母语英语 (L1) 设计的 ASR 系统通常在非母语英语 (L2) 上表现不佳。为了解决这一性能差距，\textbf{(i)}我们扩展了之前的工作，研究在丰富的 L1 和 L2 训练条件下对预训练的 wav2vec 2.0 模型 \cite{baevski2020wav2vec,xu2021self} 进行微调。我们进一步将语言模型解码以及微调方法合并到 ASR 系统中。分别量化从这两种方法中获得的收益和误差分析使我们能够识别模型中不同的改进来源。我们发现，虽然大型自训练 wav2vec 2.0 可能会内化干净 L1 语音的足够解码知识 \cite{xu2021self}，但这不适用于 L2 语音，并且解释了在 L2 数据上采用语言模型解码的效用。 本文旨在通过迁移学习和语言模型解码技术提升非英语母语者自动语音识别（ASR）系统的性能。 Peter Sullivan,Toshiko Shibano,Muhammad Abdul-Mageed cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Dean Zadok,Oren Salzman,Alon Wolf,Alex M. Bronstein
title: Towards Predicting Fine Finger Motions from Ultrasound Images via Kinematic Representation
title_zh: 通过运动学表示从超声图像预测精细手指运动
abstract: A central challenge in building robotic prostheses is the creation of a sensor-based system able to read physiological signals from the lower limb and instruct a robotic hand to perform various tasks. Existing systems typically perform discrete gestures such as pointing or grasping, by employing electromyography (EMG) or ultrasound (US) technologies to analyze muscle states. While estimating finger gestures has been done in the past by detecting prominent gestures, we are interested in detection, or inference, done in the context of fine motions that evolve over time. Examples include motions occurring when performing fine and dexterous tasks such as keyboard typing or piano playing. We consider this task as an important step towards higher adoption rates of robotic prostheses among arm amputees, as it has the potential to dramatically increase functionality in performing daily tasks. To this end, we present an end-to-end robotic system, which can successfully infer fine finger motions. This is achieved by modeling the hand as a robotic manipulator and using it as an intermediate representation to encode muscles' dynamics from a sequence of US images. We evaluated our method by collecting data from a group of subjects and demonstrating how it can be used to replay music played or text typed. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study demonstrating these downstream tasks within an end-to-end system.
summary: A central challenge in building robotic prostheses is the creation of a sensor-based system able to read physiological signals from the lower limb and instruct a robotic hand to perform various tasks. Existing systems typically perform discrete gestures such as pointing or grasping, by employing electromyography (EMG) or ultrasound (US) technologies to analyze muscle states. While estimating finger gestures has been done in the past by detecting prominent gestures, we are interested in detection, or inference, done in the context of fine motions that evolve over time. Examples include motions occurring when performing fine and dexterous tasks such as keyboard typing or piano playing. We consider this task as an important step towards higher adoption rates of robotic prostheses among arm amputees, as it has the potential to dramatically increase functionality in performing daily tasks. To this end, we present an end-to-end robotic system, which can successfully infer fine finger motions. This is achieved by modeling the hand as a robotic manipulator and using it as an intermediate representation to encode muscles' dynamics from a sequence of US images. We evaluated our method by collecting data from a group of subjects and demonstrating how it can be used to replay music played or text typed. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first study demonstrating these downstream tasks within an end-to-end system.
abstract_zh: 构建机器人假肢的一个主要挑战是创建基于传感器的系统，该系统能够读取下肢的生理信号并指示机器人手执行各种任务。现有系统通常通过采用肌电图 (EMG) 或超声 (US) 技术来分析肌肉状态来执行离散手势，例如指向或抓握。虽然过去是通过检测突出的手势来估计手指手势，但我们对在随时间演变的精细运动的背景下进行的检测或推理感兴趣。例如，执行精细而灵巧的任务（例如键盘打字或钢琴演奏）时发生的动作。我们认为这项任务是提高手臂截肢者对机器人假肢采用率的重要一步，因为它有可能显着提高执行日常任务的功能。为此，我们提出了一个端到端的机器人系统，它可以成功地推断精细的手指运动。这是通过将手建模为机器人操纵器并将其用作中间表示来从一系列 US 图像中编码肌肉动态来实现的。我们通过收集一组受试者的数据并演示如何使用它来重放播放的音乐或输入的文本来评估我们的方法。据我们所知，这是第一项在端到端系统中展示这些下游任务的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过超声图像预测精细手指运动的系统，利用运动学表示实现对手部肌肉动态的编码。
AI.motivation: 现有假肢系统难以实现精细连续的手指动作控制，限制了其在日常复杂任务中的应用。
AI.method: 将手建模为机械臂，通过超声图像序列编码肌肉动态，并构建端到端系统实现运动学表示的映射。
AI.result: 系统成功实现了音乐演奏和文本输入的回放，是首个在端到端系统中完成此类任务的研究。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为提升截肢者假肢的精细操作能力提供了新途径，有助于提高假肢的实用性和普及率。

authors_text: Shivani Kamtikar,Samhita Marri,Benjamin Walt,Naveen Kumar Uppalapati,Girish Krishnan,Girish Chowdhary
title: Visual Servoing for Pose Control of Soft Continuum Arm in a Structured Environment
title_zh: 结构化环境中软连续臂姿态控制的视觉伺服
abstract: For soft continuum arms, visual servoing is a popular control strategy that relies on visual feedback to close the control loop. However, robust visual servoing is challenging as it requires reliable feature extraction from the image, accurate control models and sensors to perceive the shape of the arm, both of which can be hard to implement in a soft robot. This letter circumvents these challenges by presenting a deep neural network-based method to perform smooth and robust 3D positioning tasks on a soft arm by visual servoing using a camera mounted at the distal end of the arm. A convolutional neural network is trained to predict the actuations required to achieve the desired pose in a structured environment. Integrated and modular approaches for estimating the actuations from the image are proposed and are experimentally compared. A proportional control law is implemented to reduce the error between the desired and current image as seen by the camera. The model together with the proportional feedback control makes the described approach robust to several variations such as new targets, lighting, loads, and diminution of the soft arm. Furthermore, the model lends itself to be transferred to a new environment with minimal effort.
summary: For soft continuum arms, visual servoing is a popular control strategy that relies on visual feedback to close the control loop. However, robust visual servoing is challenging as it requires reliable feature extraction from the image, accurate control models and sensors to perceive the shape of the arm, both of which can be hard to implement in a soft robot. This letter circumvents these challenges by presenting a deep neural network-based method to perform smooth and robust 3D positioning tasks on a soft arm by visual servoing using a camera mounted at the distal end of the arm. A convolutional neural network is trained to predict the actuations required to achieve the desired pose in a structured environment. Integrated and modular approaches for estimating the actuations from the image are proposed and are experimentally compared. A proportional control law is implemented to reduce the error between the desired and current image as seen by the camera. The model together with the proportional feedback control makes the described approach robust to several variations such as new targets, lighting, loads, and diminution of the soft arm. Furthermore, the model lends itself to be transferred to a new environment with minimal effort.
abstract_zh: 对于软连续体臂，视觉伺服是一种流行的控制策略，它依靠视觉反馈来闭合控制回路。然而，鲁棒的视觉伺服具有挑战性，因为它需要从图像中可靠地提取特征、精确的控制模型和传感器来感知手臂的形状，而这两者都很难在软机器人中实现。这封信通过提出一种基于深度神经网络的方法来规避这些挑战，通过使用安装在手臂远端的相机进行视觉伺服，在软臂上执行平滑且稳健的 3D 定位任务。训练卷积神经网络来预测在结构化环境中实现所需姿势所需的驱动。提出了用于估计图像驱动的集成和模块化方法，并进行了实验比较。实施比例控制律以减少相机所看到的所需图像和当前图像之间的误差。该模型与比例反馈控制一起使所描述的方法对多种变化具有鲁棒性，例如新目标、照明、负载和软臂的缩小。此外，该模型可以轻松地转移到新环境。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的视觉伺服方法，用于在结构化环境中实现软体连续臂的鲁棒三维定位控制。
AI.motivation: 传统视觉伺服在软体机器人中面临特征提取不可靠、控制模型不精确等挑战，需开发更鲁棒的解决方案以适应环境变化。
AI.method: 训练卷积神经网络从图像预测所需驱动量，结合末端摄像头的视觉反馈与比例控制律，提出模块化估计方法并进行实验对比。
AI.result: 系统在新目标、光照变化、负载差异及软臂形变等场景下均表现鲁棒，且模型可迁移至新环境且无需大量再训练。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过深度学习与比例控制结合，为软体连续臂在结构化环境中的姿态控制提供了可迁移、鲁棒的视觉伺服方案。

search_text: Visual Servoing for Pose Control of Soft Continuum Arm in a Structured Environment 结构化环境中软连续臂姿态控制的视觉伺服 For soft continuum arms, visual servoing is a popular control strategy that relies on visual feedback to close the control loop. However, robust visual servoing is challenging as it requires reliable feature extraction from the image, accurate control models and sensors to perceive the shape of the arm, both of which can be hard to implement in a soft robot. This letter circumvents these challenges by presenting a deep neural network-based method to perform smooth and robust 3D positioning tasks on a soft arm by visual servoing using a camera mounted at the distal end of the arm. A convolutional neural network is trained to predict the actuations required to achieve the desired pose in a structured environment. Integrated and modular approaches for estimating the actuations from the image are proposed and are experimentally compared. A proportional control law is implemented to reduce the error between the desired and current image as seen by the camera. The model together with the proportional feedback control makes the described approach robust to several variations such as new targets, lighting, loads, and diminution of the soft arm. Furthermore, the model lends itself to be transferred to a new environment with minimal effort. 对于软连续体臂，视觉伺服是一种流行的控制策略，它依靠视觉反馈来闭合控制回路。然而，鲁棒的视觉伺服具有挑战性，因为它需要从图像中可靠地提取特征、精确的控制模型和传感器来感知手臂的形状，而这两者都很难在软机器人中实现。这封信通过提出一种基于深度神经网络的方法来规避这些挑战，通过使用安装在手臂远端的相机进行视觉伺服，在软臂上执行平滑且稳健的 3D 定位任务。训练卷积神经网络来预测在结构化环境中实现所需姿势所需的驱动。提出了用于估计图像驱动的集成和模块化方法，并进行了实验比较。实施比例控制律以减少相机所看到的所需图像和当前图像之间的误差。该模型与比例反馈控制一起使所描述的方法对多种变化具有鲁棒性，例如新目标、照明、负载和软臂的缩小。此外，该模型可以轻松地转移到新环境。 本文提出了一种基于深度神经网络的视觉伺服方法，用于在结构化环境中实现软体连续臂的鲁棒三维定位控制。 Shivani Kamtikar,Samhita Marri,Benjamin Walt,Naveen Kumar Uppalapati,Girish Krishnan,Girish Chowdhary cs.RO,cs.AI,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Christoph Leitner,Robert Jarolim,Bernhard Englmair,Annika Kruse,Karen Andrea Lara Hernandez,Andreas Konrad,Eric Su,Jörg Schröttner,Luke A. Kelly,Glen A. Lichtwark,Markus Tilp,Christian Baumgartner
title: A Human-Centered Machine-Learning Approach for Muscle-Tendon Junction Tracking in Ultrasound Images
title_zh: 一种以人为中心的机器学习方法，用于超声图像中的肌肉肌腱连接点跟踪
comment: in IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering
comments: in IEEE Transactions on Biomedical Engineering
abstract: Biomechanical and clinical gait research observes muscles and tendons in limbs to study their functions and behaviour. Therefore, movements of distinct anatomical landmarks, such as muscle-tendon junctions, are frequently measured. We propose a reliable and time efficient machine-learning approach to track these junctions in ultrasound videos and support clinical biomechanists in gait analysis. In order to facilitate this process, a method based on deep-learning was introduced. We gathered an extensive dataset, covering 3 functional movements, 2 muscles, collected on 123 healthy and 38 impaired subjects with 3 different ultrasound systems, and providing a total of 66864 annotated ultrasound images in our network training. Furthermore, we used data collected across independent laboratories and curated by researchers with varying levels of experience. For the evaluation of our method a diverse test-set was selected that is independently verified by four specialists. We show that our model achieves similar performance scores to the four human specialists in identifying the muscle-tendon junction position. Our method provides time-efficient tracking of muscle-tendon junctions, with prediction times of up to 0.078 seconds per frame (approx. 100 times faster than manual labeling). All our codes, trained models and test-set were made publicly available and our model is provided as a free-to-use online service on https://deepmtj.org/.

abstract_zh: 生物力学和临床步态研究观察四肢的肌肉和肌腱，以研究它们的功能和行为。因此，经常测量不同解剖标志的运动，例如肌肉肌腱连接处。我们提出了一种可靠且省时的机器学习方法来跟踪超声视频中的这些连接点并支持临床生物力学专家进行步态分析。为了促进这一过程，引入了基于深度学习的方法。我们收集了一个广泛的数据集，涵盖 3 种功能运动、2 种肌肉，通过 3 种不同的超声系统收集了 123 名健康受试者和 38 名受损受试者，并在我们的网络训练中提供了总共 66864 张带注释的超声图像。此外，我们使用了在独立实验室收集并由具有不同经验水平的研究人员整理的数据。为了评估我们的方法，选择了由四位专家独立验证的多样化测试集。我们表明，我们的模型在识别肌肉肌腱连接位置方面取得了与四位人类专家相似的性能分数。我们的方法提供了肌肉-肌腱连接点的高效跟踪，每帧预测时间高达 0.078 秒（比手动标记快约 100 倍）。我们所有的代码、经过训练的模型和测试集都是公开的，并且我们的模型在 https://deepmtj.org/ 上作为免费使用的在线服务提供。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于深度学习的机器学习方法，用于在超声图像中高效追踪肌肉-肌腱连接点。
AI.motivation: 传统手动标注肌肉-肌腱连接点耗时且效率低，需开发自动化工具以支持临床步态分析。
AI.method: 构建包含健康与受损受试者超声图像的大型数据集（66,864张标注图像），采用深度学习模型训练，并通过多专家验证测试集评估性能。
AI.result: 模型预测速度达每帧0.078秒（比手动标注快100倍），性能与四位专家相当。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为临床生物力学研究提供了高效、可靠的肌肉-肌腱连接点追踪工具，已开源并提供在线服务。

authors_text: Maja Franz,Lucas Wolf,Maniraman Periyasamy,Christian Ufrecht,Daniel D. Scherer,Axel Plinge,Christopher Mutschler,Wolfgang Mauerer
title: Uncovering Instabilities in Variational-Quantum Deep Q-Networks
title_zh: 揭示变分量子深度 Q 网络中的不稳定性
comment: Authors Maja Franz, Lucas Wolf, Maniraman Periyasamy contributed equally (name order randomised). To be published in the Journal of The Franklin Institute
comments: Authors Maja Franz, Lucas Wolf, Maniraman Periyasamy contributed equally (name order randomised). To be published in the Journal of The Franklin Institute
abstract: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has considerably advanced over the past decade. At the same time, state-of-the-art RL algorithms require a large computational budget in terms of training time to converge. Recent work has started to approach this problem through the lens of quantum computing, which promises theoretical speed-ups for several traditionally hard tasks. In this work, we examine a class of hybrid quantum-classical RL algorithms that we collectively refer to as variational quantum deep Q-networks (VQ-DQN). We show that VQ-DQN approaches are subject to instabilities that cause the learned policy to diverge, study the extent to which this afflicts reproduciblity of established results based on classical simulation, and perform systematic experiments to identify potential explanations for the observed instabilities. Additionally, and in contrast to most existing work on quantum reinforcement learning, we execute RL algorithms on an actual quantum processing unit (an IBM Quantum Device) and investigate differences in behaviour between simulated and physical quantum systems that suffer from implementation deficiencies. Our experiments show that, contrary to opposite claims in the literature, it cannot be conclusively decided if known quantum approaches, even if simulated without physical imperfections, can provide an advantage as compared to classical approaches. Finally, we provide a robust, universal and well-tested implementation of VQ-DQN as a reproducible testbed for future experiments.
summary: Deep Reinforcement Learning (RL) has considerably advanced over the past decade. At the same time, state-of-the-art RL algorithms require a large computational budget in terms of training time to converge. Recent work has started to approach this problem through the lens of quantum computing, which promises theoretical speed-ups for several traditionally hard tasks. In this work, we examine a class of hybrid quantum-classical RL algorithms that we collectively refer to as variational quantum deep Q-networks (VQ-DQN). We show that VQ-DQN approaches are subject to instabilities that cause the learned policy to diverge, study the extent to which this afflicts reproduciblity of established results based on classical simulation, and perform systematic experiments to identify potential explanations for the observed instabilities. Additionally, and in contrast to most existing work on quantum reinforcement learning, we execute RL algorithms on an actual quantum processing unit (an IBM Quantum Device) and investigate differences in behaviour between simulated and physical quantum systems that suffer from implementation deficiencies. Our experiments show that, contrary to opposite claims in the literature, it cannot be conclusively decided if known quantum approaches, even if simulated without physical imperfections, can provide an advantage as compared to classical approaches. Finally, we provide a robust, universal and well-tested implementation of VQ-DQN as a reproducible testbed for future experiments.
abstract_zh: 深度强化学习（RL）在过去十年中取得了长足的进步。与此同时，最先进的强化学习算法在训练时间方面需要大量的计算预算才能收敛。最近的工作已经开始通过量子计算的视角来解决这个问题，量子计算有望在理论上加速一些传统的困难任务。在这项工作中，我们研究了一类混合量子经典 RL 算法，我们统称为变分量子深度 Q 网络 (VQ-DQN)。我们表明，VQ-DQN 方法会受到不稳定性的影响，从而导致学习策略发散，研究这种情况对基于经典模拟的既定结果的可重复性的影响程度，并进行系统实验以确定观察到的不稳定性的潜在解释。此外，与大多数现有的量子强化学习工作相比，我们在实际的量子处理单元（IBM 量子设备）上执行强化学习算法，并研究存在实现缺陷的模拟量子系统和物理量子系统之间的行为差​​异。我们的实验表明，与文献中相反的主张相反，无法最终确定已知的量子方法（即使在没有物理缺陷的情况下进行模拟）与经典方法相比是否具有优势。最后，我们提供了一个强大、通用且经过充分测试的 VQ-DQN 实现，作为未来实验的可重复测试平台。

AI.tldr: 本文研究变分量子深度Q网络（VQ-DQN）中的不稳定性问题，分析其在模拟与实际量子设备中的表现差异，并评估量子方法相对于经典方法的潜在优势。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习需要大量计算资源，量子计算可能提供加速，但现有量子强化学习方法存在可重复性与实际应用的不确定性，需深入分析其稳定性与有效性。
AI.method: 通过理论分析与实验验证，研究VQ-DQN的不稳定性来源；在经典模拟与IBM量子设备上进行对比实验，系统评估模拟缺陷与物理实现差异对结果的影响。
AI.result: 发现VQ-DQN策略易因不稳定性发散，模拟与物理量子系统行为存在显著差异，且无法确定量子方法在无物理缺陷模拟下是否优于经典方法。
AI.conclusion: 量子强化学习方法在现有条件下难以证明优于经典方法，需进一步优化算法稳定性与硬件实现；提供可复现的VQ-DQN框架以支持后续研究。

Additionally, and in contrast to most existing work on quantum reinforcement learning, we execute RL algorithms on an actual quantum processing unit (an IBM Quantum Device) and investigate differences in behaviour between simulated and physical quantum systems that suffer from implementation deficiencies. Our experiments show that, contrary to opposite claims in the literature, it cannot be conclusively decided if known quantum approaches, even if simulated without physical imperfections, can provide an advantage as compared to classical approaches. Finally, we provide a robust, universal and well-tested implementation of VQ-DQN as a reproducible testbed for future experiments. 深度强化学习（RL）在过去十年中取得了长足的进步。与此同时，最先进的强化学习算法在训练时间方面需要大量的计算预算才能收敛。最近的工作已经开始通过量子计算的视角来解决这个问题，量子计算有望在理论上加速一些传统的困难任务。在这项工作中，我们研究了一类混合量子经典 RL 算法，我们统称为变分量子深度 Q 网络 (VQ-DQN)。我们表明，VQ-DQN 方法会受到不稳定性的影响，从而导致学习策略发散，研究这种情况对基于经典模拟的既定结果的可重复性的影响程度，并进行系统实验以确定观察到的不稳定性的潜在解释。此外，与大多数现有的量子强化学习工作相比，我们在实际的量子处理单元（IBM 量子设备）上执行强化学习算法，并研究存在实现缺陷的模拟量子系统和物理量子系统之间的行为差​​异。我们的实验表明，与文献中相反的主张相反，无法最终确定已知的量子方法（即使在没有物理缺陷的情况下进行模拟）与经典方法相比是否具有优势。最后，我们提供了一个强大、通用且经过充分测试的 VQ-DQN 实现，作为未来实验的可重复测试平台。 本文研究变分量子深度Q网络（VQ-DQN）中的不稳定性问题，分析其在模拟与实际量子设备中的表现差异，并评估量子方法相对于经典方法的潜在优势。 Maja Franz,Lucas Wolf,Maniraman Periyasamy,Christian Ufrecht,Daniel D. Scherer,Axel Plinge,Christopher Mutschler,Wolfgang Mauerer quant-ph,cs.AI

authors_text: Marco Virgolin,Andrea De Lorenzo,Tanja Alderliesten,Peter A. N. Bosman
title: Adults as Augmentations for Children in Facial Emotion Recognition with Contrastive Learning
title_zh: 成人通过对比学习增强儿童的面部情绪识别
abstract: Emotion recognition in children can help the early identification of, and intervention on, psychological complications that arise in stressful situations such as cancer treatment. Though deep learning models are increasingly being adopted, data scarcity is often an issue in pediatric medicine, including for facial emotion recognition in children. In this paper, we study the application of data augmentation-based contrastive learning to overcome data scarcity in facial emotion recognition for children. We explore the idea of ignoring generational gaps, by adding abundantly available adult data to pediatric data, to learn better representations. We investigate different ways by which adult facial expression images can be used alongside those of children. In particular, we propose to explicitly incorporate within each mini-batch adult images as augmentations for children's. Out of $84$ combinations of learning approaches and training set sizes, we find that supervised contrastive learning with the proposed training scheme performs best, reaching a test accuracy that typically surpasses the one of the second-best approach by 2% to 3%. Our results indicate that adult data can be considered to be a meaningful augmentation of pediatric data for the recognition of emotional facial expression in children, and open up the possibility for other applications of contrastive learning to improve pediatric care by complementing data of children with that of adults.

In particular, we propose to explicitly incorporate within each mini-batch adult images as augmentations for children's. Out of $84$ combinations of learning approaches and training set sizes, we find that supervised contrastive learning with the proposed training scheme performs best, reaching a test accuracy that typically surpasses the one of the second-best approach by 2% to 3%. Our results indicate that adult data can be considered to be a meaningful augmentation of pediatric data for the recognition of emotional facial expression in children, and open up the possibility for other applications of contrastive learning to improve pediatric care by complementing data of children with that of adults.
abstract_zh: 儿童的情绪识别可以帮助早期识别和干预癌症治疗等压力情况下出现的心理并发症。尽管深度学习模型越来越多地被采用，但数据稀缺通常是儿科医学的一个问题，包括儿童面部情绪识别。在本文中，我们研究了基于数据增强的对比学习的应用，以克服儿童面部情绪识别中的数据稀缺问题。我们探索忽略代沟的想法，通过将大量可用的成人数据添加到儿科数据中，以学习更好的表征。我们研究了将成人面部表情图像与儿童面部表情图像一起使用的不同方式。特别是，我们建议明确地将成人图像合并到每个小批量图像中，作为儿童图像的增强。在 84 美元的学习方法和训练集大小的组合中，我们发现采用所提出的训练方案的监督对比学习表现最好，达到的测试精度通常比第二好的方法高出 2% 到 3%。我们的结果表明，成人数据可以被认为是儿科数据的有意义的增强，用于识别儿童情绪面部表情，并为对比学习的其他应用开辟了可能性，通过补充儿童与成人的数据来改善儿科护理。

AI.tldr: 本文研究利用成人面部表情数据作为增强手段，通过对比学习解决儿童面部情绪识别中的数据稀缺问题。
AI.motivation: 儿童面部情绪识别对早期心理干预至关重要，但儿科医学数据稀缺限制了深度学习模型的应用，需寻找有效数据增强方法。
AI.method: 提出将成人面部图像作为儿童数据的增强项纳入对比学习框架，在每个小批量训练中显式结合成人与儿童图像，并测试84种学习方法与数据集组合。
AI.result: 监督对比学习方案在测试准确率上优于其他方法2%-3%，验证了成人数据作为增强的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 成人数据可作为有意义的儿科数据增强手段，为对比学习在儿科医疗中的应用提供了新方向。

authors_text: John Dunham,Konstantinos Papangelis,Samuli Laato,Nicolas LaLone,Jin Ha Lee,Michael Saker
title: Pokémon GO to Pokémon STAY: How Covid-19 Affected Pokémon GO Players
title_zh: Pokémon GO 到 Pokémon STAY：Covid-19 如何影响 Pokémon GO 玩家
abstract: Since its creation, the Location-Based Game (LBG), Pokémon GO, has been embraced by a community of fans across the world. Due to its recency, the impact of COVID-19 on the community of Pokémon GO players is underexplored. We address how COVID-19 has impacted the players of Pokémon GO by building upon existing work focusing on player gratifications and impacts in Pokémon GO. Through semi-structured interviews, we provide a snapshot of the state of LBG play during unprecedented times. These player testimonies demonstrate (1) the importance of in-person socialization to LBG, (2) additional ways players use the game as a coping mechanism, and (3) how intentionality mediates player perceptions of people-place relationships. In demonstrating these behaviors, we provide a glimpse of how a game that forces players to explore the world around them changed when going outside with friends became a source of danger.
summary: Since its creation, the Location-Based Game (LBG), Pokémon GO, has been embraced by a community of fans across the world. Due to its recency, the impact of COVID-19 on the community of Pokémon GO players is underexplored. We address how COVID-19 has impacted the players of Pokémon GO by building upon existing work focusing on player gratifications and impacts in Pokémon GO. Through semi-structured interviews, we provide a snapshot of the state of LBG play during unprecedented times. These player testimonies demonstrate (1) the importance of in-person socialization to LBG, (2) additional ways players use the game as a coping mechanism, and (3) how intentionality mediates player perceptions of people-place relationships. In demonstrating these behaviors, we provide a glimpse of how a game that forces players to explore the world around them changed when going outside with friends became a source of danger.
abstract_zh: 自推出以来，定位游戏 (LBG) Pokémon GO 就受到了世界各地粉丝群体的欢迎。由于新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 疫情刚刚发生，人们尚未充分探讨新冠肺炎 (COVID-19) 对 Pokémon GO 玩家社区的影响。我们以现有的工作为基础，重点关注《Pokémon GO》中玩家的满意度和影响，从而探讨了 COVID-19 对《Pokémon GO》玩家的影响。通过半结构化访谈，我们提供了前所未有的时期 LBG 游戏状况的快照。这些玩家的证词证明了 (1) 面对面社交对 LBG 的重要性，(2) 玩家使用游戏作为应对机制的其他方式，以及 (3) 意向性如何调节玩家对人地关系的看法。在演示这些行为时，我们让我们看到了一款迫使玩家探索周围世界的游戏，当与朋友外出成为危险源时，会发生怎样的变化。

AI.tldr: 探讨新冠疫情对Pokémon GO玩家社区的影响，分析游戏行为和社交互动的变化
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏对疫情下LBG玩家体验变化的分析，需填补这一空白
AI.method: 通过半结构化访谈收集玩家在疫情期间的游戏体验和社交行为数据
AI.result: 揭示线下社交对LBG的重要性、玩家将游戏作为应对机制的新方式、意图影响人与场所关系的感知
AI.conclusion: 疫情改变了玩家的互动方式，凸显了线下社交和游戏作为应对机制的双重角色

authors_text: Prateek Singh,Ambalika Sharma,Shreesha Maiya
title: Automated Atrial Fibrillation Classification Based on Denoising Stacked Autoencoder and Optimized Deep Network
title_zh: 基于去噪堆叠自动编码器和优化深度网络的房颤自动分类
abstract: The incidences of atrial fibrillation (AFib) are increasing at a daunting rate worldwide. For the early detection of the risk of AFib, we have developed an automatic detection system based on deep neural networks. For achieving better classification, it is mandatory to have good pre-processing of physiological signals. Keeping this in mind, we have proposed a two-fold study. First, an end-to-end model is proposed to denoise the electrocardiogram signals using denoising autoencoders (DAE). To achieve denoising, we have used three networks including, convolutional neural network (CNN), dense neural network (DNN), and recurrent neural networks (RNN). Compared the three models and CNN based DAE performance is found to be better than the other two. Therefore, the signals denoised by the CNN based DAE were used to train the deep neural networks for classification. Three neural networks' performance has been evaluated using accuracy, specificity, sensitivity, and signal to noise ratio (SNR) as the evaluation criteria. The proposed end-to-end deep learning model for detecting atrial fibrillation in this study has achieved an accuracy rate of 99.20%, a specificity of 99.50%, a sensitivity of 99.50%, and a true positive rate of 99.00%. The average accuracy of the algorithms we compared is 96.26%, and our algorithm's accuracy is 3.2% higher than this average of the other algorithms. The CNN classification network performed better as compared to the other two. Additionally, the model is computationally efficient for real-time applications, and it takes approx 1.3 seconds to process 24 hours ECG signal. The proposed model was also tested on unseen dataset with different proportions of arrhythmias to examine the model's robustness, which resulted in 99.10% of recall and 98.50% of precision.

To achieve denoising, we have used three networks including, convolutional neural network (CNN), dense neural network (DNN), and recurrent neural networks (RNN). Compared the three models and CNN based DAE performance is found to be better than the other two. Therefore, the signals denoised by the CNN based DAE were used to train the deep neural networks for classification. Three neural networks' performance has been evaluated using accuracy, specificity, sensitivity, and signal to noise ratio (SNR) as the evaluation criteria. The proposed end-to-end deep learning model for detecting atrial fibrillation in this study has achieved an accuracy rate of 99.20%, a specificity of 99.50%, a sensitivity of 99.50%, and a true positive rate of 99.00%. The average accuracy of the algorithms we compared is 96.26%, and our algorithm's accuracy is 3.2% higher than this average of the other algorithms. The CNN classification network performed better as compared to the other two. Additionally, the model is computationally efficient for real-time applications, and it takes approx 1.3 seconds to process 24 hours ECG signal. The proposed model was also tested on unseen dataset with different proportions of arrhythmias to examine the model's robustness, which resulted in 99.10% of recall and 98.50% of precision.
abstract_zh: 心房颤动 (AFib) 的发病率在全球范围内以惊人的速度增加。为了早期发现 AFib 风险，我们开发了基于深度神经网络的自动检测系统。为了实现更好的分类，必须对生理信号进行良好的预处理。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一项两项研究。首先，提出了一种端到端模型，使用去噪自动编码器（DAE）对心电图信号进行去噪。为了实现去噪，我们使用了三种网络，包括卷积神经网络（CNN）、密集神经网络（DNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）。比较这三个模型，发现基于 CNN 的 DAE 性能优于其他两个。因此，基于 CNN 的 DAE 去噪的信号被用来训练深度神经网络进行分类。使用准确性、特异性、灵敏度和信噪比（SNR）作为评估标准来评估三种神经网络的性能。本研究提出的检测心房颤动的端到端深度学习模型的准确率达99.20%，特异性达99.50%，灵敏度达99.50%，真阳性率达99.00%。我们比较的算法的平均准确率为 96.26%，我们的算法的准确率比其他算法的平均准确率高 3.2%。与其他两个网络相比，CNN 分类网络表现更好。此外，该模型对于实时应用来说计算效率很高，处理 24 小时心电图信号大约需要 1.3 秒。所提出的模型还在具有不同比例心律失常的未见数据集上进行了测试，以检查模型的鲁棒性，结果为 99.10% 的召回率和 98.50% 的精确度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于去噪堆叠自编码器和优化深度网络的自动房颤分类系统，通过预处理心电信号提升分类效果。
AI.motivation: 房颤发病率持续上升，需高效准确的早期检测方法，现有技术存在信号噪声干扰和分类精度不足的问题。
AI.method: 采用卷积神经网络（CNN）、密集网络（DNN）和循环网络（RNN）构建去噪自编码器（DAE），比较后选用CNN进行信号去噪，再训练深度网络进行分类，使用准确率、灵敏度等指标评估。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到99.20%准确率、99.50%特异性与灵敏度，较对比算法提升3.2%，处理24小时ECG仅需1.3秒，召回率99.1%、精确率98.5%。
AI.conclusion: 所提模型在房颤分类任务中表现出高精度与实时性，验证了CNN去噪与深度网络结合的有效性，适用于临床实际场景。

search_text: Automated Atrial Fibrillation Classification Based on Denoising Stacked Autoencoder and Optimized Deep Network 基于去噪堆叠自动编码器和优化深度网络的房颤自动分类 The incidences of atrial fibrillation (AFib) are increasing at a daunting rate worldwide. For the early detection of the risk of AFib, we have developed an automatic detection system based on deep neural networks. For achieving better classification, it is mandatory to have good pre-processing of physiological signals. Keeping this in mind, we have proposed a two-fold study. First, an end-to-end model is proposed to denoise the electrocardiogram signals using denoising autoencoders (DAE). To achieve denoising, we have used three networks including, convolutional neural network (CNN), dense neural network (DNN), and recurrent neural networks (RNN). Compared the three models and CNN based DAE performance is found to be better than the other two. Therefore, the signals denoised by the CNN based DAE were used to train the deep neural networks for classification. Three neural networks' performance has been evaluated using accuracy, specificity, sensitivity, and signal to noise ratio (SNR) as the evaluation criteria. The proposed end-to-end deep learning model for detecting atrial fibrillation in this study has achieved an accuracy rate of 99.20%, a specificity of 99.50%, a sensitivity of 99.50%, and a true positive rate of 99.00%. The average accuracy of the algorithms we compared is 96.26%, and our algorithm's accuracy is 3.2% higher than this average of the other algorithms. The CNN classification network performed better as compared to the other two. Additionally, the model is computationally efficient for real-time applications, and it takes approx 1.3 seconds to process 24 hours ECG signal. The proposed model was also tested on unseen dataset with different proportions of arrhythmias to examine the model's robustness, which resulted in 99.10% of recall and 98.50% of precision. 心房颤动 (AFib) 的发病率在全球范围内以惊人的速度增加。为了早期发现 AFib 风险，我们开发了基于深度神经网络的自动检测系统。为了实现更好的分类，必须对生理信号进行良好的预处理。考虑到这一点，我们提出了一项两项研究。首先，提出了一种端到端模型，使用去噪自动编码器（DAE）对心电图信号进行去噪。为了实现去噪，我们使用了三种网络，包括卷积神经网络（CNN）、密集神经网络（DNN）和循环神经网络（RNN）。比较这三个模型，发现基于 CNN 的 DAE 性能优于其他两个。因此，基于 CNN 的 DAE 去噪的信号被用来训练深度神经网络进行分类。使用准确性、特异性、灵敏度和信噪比（SNR）作为评估标准来评估三种神经网络的性能。本研究提出的检测心房颤动的端到端深度学习模型的准确率达99.20%，特异性达99.50%，灵敏度达99.50%，真阳性率达99.00%。我们比较的算法的平均准确率为 96.26%，我们的算法的准确率比其他算法的平均准确率高 3.2%。与其他两个网络相比，CNN 分类网络表现更好。此外，该模型对于实时应用来说计算效率很高，处理 24 小时心电图信号大约需要 1.3 秒。所提出的模型还在具有不同比例心律失常的未见数据集上进行了测试，以检查模型的鲁棒性，结果为 99.10% 的召回率和 98.50% 的精确度。 本文提出基于去噪堆叠自编码器和优化深度网络的自动房颤分类系统，通过预处理心电信号提升分类效果。 Prateek Singh,Ambalika Sharma,Shreesha Maiya eess.SP,cs.LG,eess.IV

authors_text: Giulio Tirabassi,Ji Kaiwen,Cristina Masoller,Alejandro M. Yacomotti
title: Image classification using collective optical modes of an array of nanolasers
title_zh: 使用纳米激光器阵列的集体光学模式进行图像分类
abstract: Recent advancements in nanolaser design and manufacturing open up unprecedented perspectives in terms of high integration densities and ultra-low power consumption, making these devices ideal for high-performance optical computing systems. In this work we exploit the symmetry properties of the collective modes of a nanolaser array for binary image classification. The implementation is based on a 8x8 array, and relies on the activation of a collective optical mode of the array, the so-called "zero mode", under spatially modulated pump patterns. We demonstrate that a simple training strategy allows us to achieve an overall success rate of 98% in binary image recognition.
summary: Recent advancements in nanolaser design and manufacturing open up unprecedented perspectives in terms of high integration densities and ultra-low power consumption, making these devices ideal for high-performance optical computing systems. In this work we exploit the symmetry properties of the collective modes of a nanolaser array for binary image classification. The implementation is based on a 8x8 array, and relies on the activation of a collective optical mode of the array, the so-called "zero mode", under spatially modulated pump patterns. We demonstrate that a simple training strategy allows us to achieve an overall success rate of 98% in binary image recognition.
abstract_zh: 纳米激光器设计和制造的最新进展在高集成密度和超低功耗方面开辟了前所未有的前景，使这些设备成为高性能光学计算系统的理想选择。在这项工作中，我们利用纳米激光阵列集体模式的对称性进行二值图像分类。该实现基于 8x8 阵列，并依赖于空间调制泵浦图案下阵列的集体光学模式（即所谓的“零模式”）的激活。我们证明，简单的训练策略使我们能够在二值图像识别中实现 98% 的总体成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出利用纳米激光器阵列的集体光学模式进行二值图像分类的方法。
AI.motivation: 纳米激光器具备高集成度和低功耗特性，适合构建高性能光学计算系统，但其集体光学模式在图像分类中的应用尚未被充分探索。
AI.method: 基于8x8纳米激光器阵列，通过空间调制泵浦模式激活'零模式'，结合简单训练策略实现图像分类。
AI.result: 在二值图像识别任务中达到98%的总体准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了利用集体光学模式进行光计算图像分类的可行性，为新型光学计算系统提供了新思路。

authors_text: Gourav Siddhad,Anmol Gupta,Debi Prosad Dogra,Partha Pratim Roy
title: Efficacy of Transformer Networks for Classification of Raw EEG Data
title_zh: 变压器网络对原始脑电图数据分类的功效
comment: ef:Biomedical Signal Processing and Control, Vol 87, 2023
comments: ef:Biomedical Signal Processing and Control, Vol 87, 2023
abstract: With the unprecedented success of transformer networks in natural language processing (NLP), recently, they have been successfully adapted to areas like computer vision, generative adversarial networks (GAN), and reinforcement learning. Classifying electroencephalogram (EEG) data has been challenging and researchers have been overly dependent on pre-processing and hand-crafted feature extraction. Despite having achieved automated feature extraction in several other domains, deep learning has not yet been accomplished for EEG. In this paper, the efficacy of the transformer network for the classification of raw EEG data (cleaned and pre-processed) is explored. The performance of transformer networks was evaluated on a local (age and gender data) and a public dataset (STEW). First, a classifier using a transformer network is built to classify the age and gender of a person with raw resting-state EEG data. Second, the classifier is tuned for mental workload classification with open access raw multi-tasking mental workload EEG data (STEW). The network achieves an accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art accuracy on both the local (Age and Gender dataset; 94.53% (gender) and 87.79% (age)) and the public (STEW dataset; 95.28% (two workload levels) and 88.72% (three workload levels)) dataset. The accuracy values have been achieved using raw EEG data without feature extraction. Results indicate that the transformer-based deep learning models can successfully abate the need for heavy feature-extraction of EEG data for successful classification.
summary: With the unprecedented success of transformer networks in natural language processing (NLP), recently, they have been successfully adapted to areas like computer vision, generative adversarial networks (GAN), and reinforcement learning. Classifying electroencephalogram (EEG) data has been challenging and researchers have been overly dependent on pre-processing and hand-crafted feature extraction. Despite having achieved automated feature extraction in several other domains, deep learning has not yet been accomplished for EEG. In this paper, the efficacy of the transformer network for the classification of raw EEG data (cleaned and pre-processed) is explored. The performance of transformer networks was evaluated on a local (age and gender data) and a public dataset (STEW). First, a classifier using a transformer network is built to classify the age and gender of a person with raw resting-state EEG data. Second, the classifier is tuned for mental workload classification with open access raw multi-tasking mental workload EEG data (STEW). The network achieves an accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art accuracy on both the local (Age and Gender dataset; 94.53% (gender) and 87.79% (age)) and the public (STEW dataset; 95.28% (two workload levels) and 88.72% (three workload levels)) dataset. The accuracy values have been achieved using raw EEG data without feature extraction. Results indicate that the transformer-based deep learning models can successfully abate the need for heavy feature-extraction of EEG data for successful classification.
abstract_zh: 随着 Transformer 网络在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域取得前所未有的成功，最近它们已成功应用于计算机视觉、生成对抗网络 (GAN) 和强化学习等领域。对脑电图 (EEG) 数据进行分类一直具有挑战性，研究人员过度依赖预处理和手工特征提取。尽管在其他几个领域已经实现了自动特征提取，但脑电图的深度学习尚未实现。在本文中，探讨了变压器网络对原始脑电图数据（经过清理和预处理）进行分类的功效。变压器网络的性能在本地（年龄和性别数据）和公共数据集（STEW）上进行评估。首先，建立一个使用变压器网络的分类器，通过原始静息态脑电图数据对人的年龄和性别进行分类。其次，利用开放获取的原始多任务心理工作量脑电图数据（STEW）对分类器进行调整，以进行心理工作量分类。该网络在本地（年龄和性别数据集；94.53%（性别）和 87.79%（年龄））和公共（STEW 数据集；95.28%（两个工作负载级别）和 88.72%（三个工作负载级别））数据集上实现了与最先进的精度相当的精度。准确度值是使用原始脑电图数据获得的，无需特征提取。结果表明，基于 Transformer 的深度学习模型可以成功地减少对 EEG 数据进行大量特征提取以实现成功分类的需求。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了Transformer网络在分类原始脑电图（EEG）数据中的有效性，无需传统特征提取即可实现高准确率分类。
AI.motivation: EEG分类因依赖预处理和手工特征提取而面临挑战，而Transformer在其他领域已展现自动化特征提取能力，因此需验证其在EEG分类中的潜力。
AI.method: 在本地（年龄和性别数据集）和公开数据集（STEW）上构建基于Transformer的分类器，分别用于静息态EEG的年龄/性别分类及多任务工作负荷分类，均使用原始数据且不进行特征提取。
AI.result: 在本地数据集上性别分类准确率达94.53%，年龄分类87.79%；在STEW数据集上双分类工作负荷达95.28%，三分类达88.72%，均达到当时最先进的水平。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型能有效替代EEG分类中的传统特征工程，显著简化流程并保持高分类性能。

ai_content.conclusion: Transformer模型能有效替代EEG分类中的传统特征工程，显著简化流程并保持高分类性能。

search_text: Efficacy of Transformer Networks for Classification of Raw EEG Data 变压器网络对原始脑电图数据分类的功效 With the unprecedented success of transformer networks in natural language processing (NLP), recently, they have been successfully adapted to areas like computer vision, generative adversarial networks (GAN), and reinforcement learning. Classifying electroencephalogram (EEG) data has been challenging and researchers have been overly dependent on pre-processing and hand-crafted feature extraction. Despite having achieved automated feature extraction in several other domains, deep learning has not yet been accomplished for EEG. In this paper, the efficacy of the transformer network for the classification of raw EEG data (cleaned and pre-processed) is explored. The performance of transformer networks was evaluated on a local (age and gender data) and a public dataset (STEW). First, a classifier using a transformer network is built to classify the age and gender of a person with raw resting-state EEG data. Second, the classifier is tuned for mental workload classification with open access raw multi-tasking mental workload EEG data (STEW). The network achieves an accuracy comparable to state-of-the-art accuracy on both the local (Age and Gender dataset; 94.53% (gender) and 87.79% (age)) and the public (STEW dataset; 95.28% (two workload levels) and 88.72% (three workload levels)) dataset. The accuracy values have been achieved using raw EEG data without feature extraction. Results indicate that the transformer-based deep learning models can successfully abate the need for heavy feature-extraction of EEG data for successful classification. 随着 Transformer 网络在自然语言处理 (NLP) 领域取得前所未有的成功，最近它们已成功应用于计算机视觉、生成对抗网络 (GAN) 和强化学习等领域。对脑电图 (EEG) 数据进行分类一直具有挑战性，研究人员过度依赖预处理和手工特征提取。尽管在其他几个领域已经实现了自动特征提取，但脑电图的深度学习尚未实现。在本文中，探讨了变压器网络对原始脑电图数据（经过清理和预处理）进行分类的功效。变压器网络的性能在本地（年龄和性别数据）和公共数据集（STEW）上进行评估。首先，建立一个使用变压器网络的分类器，通过原始静息态脑电图数据对人的年龄和性别进行分类。其次，利用开放获取的原始多任务心理工作量脑电图数据（STEW）对分类器进行调整，以进行心理工作量分类。该网络在本地（年龄和性别数据集；94.53%（性别）和 87.79%（年龄））和公共（STEW 数据集；95.28%（两个工作负载级别）和 88.72%（三个工作负载级别））数据集上实现了与最先进的精度相当的精度。准确度值是使用原始脑电图数据获得的，无需特征提取。结果表明，基于 Transformer 的深度学习模型可以成功地减少对 EEG 数据进行大量特征提取以实现成功分类的需求。 本文探讨了Transformer网络在分类原始脑电图（EEG）数据中的有效性，无需传统特征提取即可实现高准确率分类。 Gourav Siddhad,Anmol Gupta,Debi Prosad Dogra,Partha Pratim Roy eess.SP,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Rami N. Khushaba,Andrew J. Hill
title: Radar-based Materials Classification Using Deep Wavelet Scattering Transform: A Comparison of Centimeter vs. Millimeter Wave Units
title_zh: 使用深小波散射变换进行基于雷达的材料分类：厘米波与毫米波单位的比较
comment: 6 pages, 8 figures, accepted IEEE in Robotics and Automation Letters c. January 2022 associated video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mfohzvf7iuA
comments: 6 pages, 8 figures, accepted IEEE in Robotics and Automation Letters c. January 2022 associated video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Mfohzvf7iuA
abstract: Radar-based materials detection received significant attention in recent years for its potential inclusion in consumer and industrial applications like object recognition for grasping and manufacturing quality assurance and control. Several radar publications were developed for material classification under controlled settings with specific materials' properties and shapes. Recent literature has challenged the earlier findings on radars-based materials classification claiming that earlier solutions are not easily scaled to industrial applications due to a variety of real-world issues. Published experiments on the impact of these factors on the robustness of the extracted radar-based traditional features have already demonstrated that the application of deep neural networks can mitigate, to some extent, the impact to produce a viable solution. However, previous studies lacked an investigation of the usefulness of lower frequency radar units, specifically <10GHz, against the higher range units around and above 60GHz. This research considers two radar units with different frequency ranges: Walabot-3D (6.3-8 GHz) cm-wave and IMAGEVK-74 (62-69 GHz) mm-wave imaging units by Vayyar Imaging. A comparison is presented on the applicability of each unit for material classification. This work extends upon previous efforts, by applying deep wavelet scattering transform for the identification of different materials based on the reflected signals. In the wavelet scattering feature extractor, data is propagated through a series of wavelet transforms, nonlinearities, and averaging to produce low-variance representations of the reflected radar signals. This work is unique in comparison of the radar units and algorithms in material classification and includes real-time demonstrations that show strong performance by both units, with increased robustness offered by the cm-wave radar unit.

Several radar publications were developed for material classification under controlled settings with specific materials' properties and shapes. Published experiments on the impact of these factors on the robustness of the extracted radar-based traditional features have already demonstrated that the application of deep neural networks can mitigate, to some extent, the impact to produce a viable solution. However, previous studies lacked an investigation of the usefulness of lower frequency radar units, specifically <10GHz, against the higher range units around and above 60GHz. This research considers two radar units with different frequency ranges: Walabot-3D (6.3-8 GHz) cm-wave and IMAGEVK-74 (62-69 GHz) mm-wave imaging units by Vayyar Imaging. A comparison is presented on the applicability of each unit for material classification. This work extends upon previous efforts, by applying deep wavelet scattering transform for the identification of different materials based on the reflected signals. In the wavelet scattering feature extractor, data is propagated through a series of wavelet transforms, nonlinearities, and averaging to produce low-variance representations of the reflected radar signals. This work is unique in comparison of the radar units and algorithms in material classification and includes real-time demonstrations that show strong performance by both units, with increased robustness offered by the cm-wave radar unit.
abstract_zh: 近年来，基于雷达的材料检测因其在消费和工业应用中的潜在应用而受到广泛关注，例如用于抓取的物体识别以及制造质量保证和控制。开发了一些雷达出版物，用于在受控设置下根据特定材料的属性和形状进行材料分类。最近的文献对基于雷达的材料分类的早期发现提出了挑战，声称由于各种现实问题，早期的解决方案不容易扩展到工业应用。已发表的关于这些因素对提取的基于雷达的传统特征的鲁棒性影响的实验已经证明，深度神经网络的应用可以在一定程度上减轻影响，从而产生可行的解决方案。然而，之前的研究缺乏对较低频率雷达单元（特别是 <10GHz）相对于 60GHz 左右及以上较高范围单元的有用性的调查。本研究考虑了两种不同频率范围的雷达单元：Vayyar Imaging 的 Walabot-3D (6.3-8 GHz) 厘米波和 IMAGEVK-74 (62-69 GHz) 毫米波成像单元。对每个单元对材料分类的适用性进行了比较。这项工作在之前的工作的基础上进行了扩展，通过应用深度小波散射变换来根据反射信号识别不同的材料。在小波散射特征提取器中，数据通过一系列小波变换、非线性和平均来传播，以产生反射雷达信号的低方差表示。这项工作在材料分类中的雷达单元和算法的比较中是独一无二的，并且包括实时演示，显示这两个单元都具有强大的性能，并且厘米波雷达单元提供了更高的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 本文比较了厘米波和毫米波雷达单元在基于深度小波散射变换的材料分类中的适用性。
AI.motivation: 早期基于雷达的材料分类方法难以扩展到工业应用，且缺乏对低频雷达（<10GHz）与高频雷达（≥60GHz）性能差异的系统研究。
AI.method: 采用深度小波散射变换提取雷达反射信号的低方差特征，对比Walabot-3D（6.3-8GHz）和IMAGEVK-74（62-69GHz）两种雷达单元的分类性能。
AI.result: 两种雷达单元均表现良好，但厘米波雷达在复杂环境下的鲁棒性更优。
AI.conclusion: 厘米波雷达更适合工业场景的材料分类，深度小波散射变换有效提升了分类鲁棒性。

ai_content.tldr: 本文比较了厘米波和毫米波雷达单元在基于深度小波散射变换的材料分类中的适用性。

ai_content.result: 两种雷达单元均表现良好，但厘米波雷达在复杂环境下的鲁棒性更优。
ai_content.conclusion: 厘米波雷达更适合工业场景的材料分类，深度小波散射变换有效提升了分类鲁棒性。
