authors_text: Gorkem Polat,Ilkay Ergenc,Haluk Tarik Kani,Yesim Ozen Alahdab,Ozlen Atug,Alptekin Temizel
title: Class Distance Weighted Cross-Entropy Loss for Ulcerative Colitis Severity Estimation
title_zh: 溃疡性结肠炎严重程度估计的类距离加权交叉熵损失
comment: 26th UK Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis. 15 pages, 5 figures
comments: 26th UK Conference on Medical Image Understanding and Analysis. 15 pages, 5 figures
abstract: In scoring systems used to measure the endoscopic activity of ulcerative colitis, such as Mayo endoscopic score or Ulcerative Colitis Endoscopic Index Severity, levels increase with severity of the disease activity. Such relative ranking among the scores makes it an ordinal regression problem. On the other hand, most studies use categorical cross-entropy loss function to train deep learning models, which is not optimal for the ordinal regression problem. In this study, we propose a novel loss function, class distance weighted cross-entropy (CDW-CE), that respects the order of the classes and takes the distance of the classes into account in calculation of the cost. Experimental evaluations show that models trained with CDW-CE outperform the models trained with conventional categorical cross-entropy and other commonly used loss functions which are designed for the ordinal regression problems. In addition, the class activation maps of models trained with CDW-CE loss are more class-discriminative and they are found to be more reasonable by the domain experts.
summary: In scoring systems used to measure the endoscopic activity of ulcerative colitis, such as Mayo endoscopic score or Ulcerative Colitis Endoscopic Index Severity, levels increase with severity of the disease activity. Such relative ranking among the scores makes it an ordinal regression problem. On the other hand, most studies use categorical cross-entropy loss function to train deep learning models, which is not optimal for the ordinal regression problem. In this study, we propose a novel loss function, class distance weighted cross-entropy (CDW-CE), that respects the order of the classes and takes the distance of the classes into account in calculation of the cost. Experimental evaluations show that models trained with CDW-CE outperform the models trained with conventional categorical cross-entropy and other commonly used loss functions which are designed for the ordinal regression problems. In addition, the class activation maps of models trained with CDW-CE loss are more class-discriminative and they are found to be more reasonable by the domain experts.
abstract_zh: 在用于测量溃疡性结肠炎的内镜活动的评分系统中，例如梅奥内镜评分或溃疡性结肠炎内镜指数严重程度，水平随着疾病活动的严重程度而增加。分数之间的这种相对排名使其成为序数回归问题。另一方面，大多数研究使用分类交叉熵损失函数来训练深度学习模型，这对于序数回归问题来说并不是最优的。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，即类距离加权交叉熵（CDW-CE），它尊重类的顺序并在计算成本时考虑类的距离。实验评估表明，使用 CDW-CE 训练的模型优于使用传统分类交叉熵和其他专为序数回归问题设计的常用损失函数训练的模型。此外，使用 CDW-CE 损失训练的模型的类激活图更具类判别性，并且领域专家认为它们更合理。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种新的损失函数CDW-CE，用于改进溃疡性结肠炎严重程度的估计模型。
AI.motivation: 现有研究使用分类交叉熵损失函数处理有序回归问题，但未考虑类别间的顺序和距离关系，导致模型性能受限。
AI.method: 设计类距离加权交叉熵损失函数（CDW-CE），在计算损失时引入类别间距离权重，以更好地反映有序类别的层次关系。
AI.result: 实验表明，CDW-CE训练的模型在性能上优于传统交叉熵及其他有序回归损失函数，且生成的类别激活图更具判别性和临床合理性。
AI.conclusion: CDW-CE能有效提升有序回归任务的模型表现，为医学图像分析中的严重程度评估提供新方法。

ai_content.result: 实验表明，CDW-CE训练的模型在性能上优于传统交叉熵及其他有序回归损失函数，且生成的类别激活图更具判别性和临床合理性。

search_text: Class Distance Weighted Cross-Entropy Loss for Ulcerative Colitis Severity Estimation 溃疡性结肠炎严重程度估计的类距离加权交叉熵损失 In scoring systems used to measure the endoscopic activity of ulcerative colitis, such as Mayo endoscopic score or Ulcerative Colitis Endoscopic Index Severity, levels increase with severity of the disease activity. Such relative ranking among the scores makes it an ordinal regression problem. On the other hand, most studies use categorical cross-entropy loss function to train deep learning models, which is not optimal for the ordinal regression problem. In this study, we propose a novel loss function, class distance weighted cross-entropy (CDW-CE), that respects the order of the classes and takes the distance of the classes into account in calculation of the cost. Experimental evaluations show that models trained with CDW-CE outperform the models trained with conventional categorical cross-entropy and other commonly used loss functions which are designed for the ordinal regression problems. In addition, the class activation maps of models trained with CDW-CE loss are more class-discriminative and they are found to be more reasonable by the domain experts. 在用于测量溃疡性结肠炎的内镜活动的评分系统中，例如梅奥内镜评分或溃疡性结肠炎内镜指数严重程度，水平随着疾病活动的严重程度而增加。分数之间的这种相对排名使其成为序数回归问题。另一方面，大多数研究使用分类交叉熵损失函数来训练深度学习模型，这对于序数回归问题来说并不是最优的。在本研究中，我们提出了一种新颖的损失函数，即类距离加权交叉熵（CDW-CE），它尊重类的顺序并在计算成本时考虑类的距离。实验评估表明，使用 CDW-CE 训练的模型优于使用传统分类交叉熵和其他专为序数回归问题设计的常用损失函数训练的模型。此外，使用 CDW-CE 损失训练的模型的类激活图更具类判别性，并且领域专家认为它们更合理。 本文提出一种新的损失函数CDW-CE，用于改进溃疡性结肠炎严重程度的估计模型。 Gorkem Polat,Ilkay Ergenc,Haluk Tarik Kani,Yesim Ozen Alahdab,Ozlen Atug,Alptekin Temizel eess.IV,cs.AI,cs.CV

authors_text: Ahmad M. Karim
title: Effective classification of ECG signals using enhanced convolutional neural network in IOT
title_zh: 在物联网中使用增强型卷积神经网络对心电信号进行有效分类
comment: This article has been removed by arXiv administrators due to a copyright claim by a 3rd party
comments: This article has been removed by arXiv administrators due to a copyright claim by a 3rd party
abstract: In this paper, a novel ECG monitoring approach based on IoT technology is suggested. This paper proposes a routing system for IoT healthcare platforms based on Dynamic Source Routing (DSR) and Routing by Energy and Link Quality (REL). In addition, the Artificial Neural Network (ANN), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs)-based approaches for ECG signal categorization were tested in this study. Deep-ECG will employ a deep CNN to extract important characteristics, which will then be compared using simple and fast distance functions in order to classify cardiac problems efficiently. This work has suggested algorithms for the categorization of ECG data acquired from mobile watch users in order to identify aberrant data. The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) and Beth Israel Hospital (MIT/BIH) Arrhythmia Database have been used for experimental verification of the suggested approaches. The results show that the proposed strategy outperforms others in terms of classification accuracy.

This paper proposes a routing system for IoT healthcare platforms based on Dynamic Source Routing (DSR) and Routing by Energy and Link Quality (REL). In addition, the Artificial Neural Network (ANN), Support Vector Machine (SVM), and Convolution Neural Networks (CNNs)-based approaches for ECG signal categorization were tested in this study. Deep-ECG will employ a deep CNN to extract important characteristics, which will then be compared using simple and fast distance functions in order to classify cardiac problems efficiently. This work has suggested algorithms for the categorization of ECG data acquired from mobile watch users in order to identify aberrant data. The Massachusetts Institute of Technology (MIT) and Beth Israel Hospital (MIT/BIH) Arrhythmia Database have been used for experimental verification of the suggested approaches. The results show that the proposed strategy outperforms others in terms of classification accuracy.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种基于物联网技术的新型心电图监测方法。本文提出了一种基于动态源路由（DSR）和能量和链路质量路由（REL）的物联网医疗平台路由系统。此外，本研究还测试了基于人工神经网络 (ANN)、支持向量机 (SVM) 和卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的心电图信号分类方法。 Deep-ECG 将采用深度 CNN 来提取重要特征，然后使用简单快速的距离函数进行比较，以便有效地对心脏问题进行分类。这项工作提出了对从移动手表用户获取的心电图数据进行分类的算法，以识别异常数据。麻省理工学院 (MIT) 和贝斯以色列医院 (MIT/BIH) 心律失常数据库已用于对建议方法进行实验验证。结果表明，所提出的策略在分类精度方面优于其他策略。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于物联网（IoT）技术的增强型卷积神经网络（CNN）方法，用于高效分类心电图（ECG）信号。
AI.motivation: 通过改进ECG信号分类的准确性和效率，提升物联网医疗平台的实时监测能力，以识别异常心脏数据。
AI.method: 结合动态源路由（DSR）和能量与链路质量路由（REL）构建物联网路由系统，并采用人工神经网络（ANN）、支持向量机（SVM）及深度CNN进行ECG分类，使用MIT/BIH数据库验证。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法在分类准确率上优于传统ANN、SVM和常规CNN方法。
AI.conclusion: 基于增强CNN的ECG分类策略在物联网医疗中具有更高的准确性和实用性。

authors_text: Adrian Sandru,Mariana-Iuliana Georgescu,Radu Tudor Ionescu
title: Feature-level augmentation to improve robustness of deep neural networks to affine transformations
title_zh: 特征级增强以提高深度神经网络仿射变换的鲁棒性
comment: Accepted at ECCV Workshop on Adversarial Robustness in the Real World (AROW 2022)
comments: Accepted at ECCV Workshop on Adversarial Robustness in the Real World (AROW 2022)
abstract: Recent studies revealed that convolutional neural networks do not generalize well to small image transformations, e.g. rotations by a few degrees or translations of a few pixels. To improve the robustness to such transformations, we propose to introduce data augmentation at intermediate layers of the neural architecture, in addition to the common data augmentation applied on the input images. By introducing small perturbations to activation maps (features) at various levels, we develop the capacity of the neural network to cope with such transformations. We conduct experiments on three image classification benchmarks (Tiny ImageNet, Caltech-256 and Food-101), considering two different convolutional architectures (ResNet-18 and DenseNet-121). When compared with two state-of-the-art stabilization methods, the empirical results show that our approach consistently attains the best trade-off between accuracy and mean flip rate.
summary: Recent studies revealed that convolutional neural networks do not generalize well to small image transformations, e.g. rotations by a few degrees or translations of a few pixels. To improve the robustness to such transformations, we propose to introduce data augmentation at intermediate layers of the neural architecture, in addition to the common data augmentation applied on the input images. By introducing small perturbations to activation maps (features) at various levels, we develop the capacity of the neural network to cope with such transformations. We conduct experiments on three image classification benchmarks (Tiny ImageNet, Caltech-256 and Food-101), considering two different convolutional architectures (ResNet-18 and DenseNet-121). When compared with two state-of-the-art stabilization methods, the empirical results show that our approach consistently attains the best trade-off between accuracy and mean flip rate.
abstract_zh: 最近的研究表明，卷积神经网络不能很好地推广到小型图像变换，例如旋转几度或平移几个像素。为了提高此类转换的鲁棒性，除了应用于输入图像的常见数据增强之外，我们建议在神经架构的中间层引入数据增强。通过向各个级别的激活图（特征）引入小扰动，我们开发了神经网络应对此类转换的能力。我们在三个图像分类基准（Tiny ImageNet、Caltech-256 和 Food-101）上进行实验，考虑两种不同的卷积架构（ResNet-18 和 DenseNet-121）。与两种最先进的稳定方法相比，实证结果表明，我们的方法始终在准确性和平均翻转率之间实现最佳权衡。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种特征级数据增强方法，通过在神经网络中间层引入小扰动，提升深度网络对仿射变换的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 现有卷积网络对微小图像变换（如旋转/平移）泛化能力不足，传统输入级数据增强效果有限，需探索更有效的增强策略。
AI.method: 在输入增强基础上，于网络中间层的激活图中注入可控扰动，结合ResNet-18和DenseNet-121在三个基准数据集进行验证。
AI.result: 实验显示该方法在准确率与平均翻转率的平衡上优于两种最先进稳定化方法，且在多个分类任务中表现一致。
AI.conclusion: 特征级增强能有效提升网络鲁棒性，为对抗微小变换提供了新的架构改进方向。

authors_text: Letian Wang,Yeping Hu,Liting Sun,Wei Zhan,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Changliu Liu
title: Transferable and Adaptable Driving Behavior Prediction
title_zh: 可迁移且适应性强的驾驶行为预测
comment: 22 pages, 12 figures. Extended version of arXiv:2111.00788
comments: 22 pages, 12 figures. Extended version of arXiv:2111.00788
abstract: While autonomous vehicles still struggle to solve challenging situations during on-road driving, humans have long mastered the essence of driving with efficient, transferable, and adaptable driving capability. By mimicking humans' cognition model and semantic understanding during driving, we propose HATN, a hierarchical framework to generate high-quality, transferable, and adaptable predictions for driving behaviors in multi-agent dense-traffic environments. Our hierarchical method consists of a high-level intention identification policy and a low-level trajectory generation policy. We introduce a novel semantic sub-task definition and generic state representation for each sub-task. With these techniques, the hierarchical framework is transferable across different driving scenarios. Besides, our model is able to capture variations of driving behaviors among individuals and scenarios by an online adaptation module. We demonstrate our algorithms in the task of trajectory prediction for real traffic data at intersections and roundabouts from the INTERACTION dataset. Through extensive numerical studies, it is evident that our method significantly outperformed other methods in terms of prediction accuracy, transferability, and adaptability. Pushing the state-of-the-art performance by a considerable margin, we also provide a cognitive view of understanding the driving behavior behind such improvement. We highlight that in the future, more research attention and effort are deserved for transferability and adaptability. It is not only due to the promising performance elevation of prediction and planning algorithms, but more fundamentally, they are crucial for the scalable and general deployment of autonomous vehicles.
summary: While autonomous vehicles still struggle to solve challenging situations during on-road driving, humans have long mastered the essence of driving with efficient, transferable, and adaptable driving capability. By mimicking humans' cognition model and semantic understanding during driving, we propose HATN, a hierarchical framework to generate high-quality, transferable, and adaptable predictions for driving behaviors in multi-agent dense-traffic environments. Our hierarchical method consists of a high-level intention identification policy and a low-level trajectory generation policy. We introduce a novel semantic sub-task definition and generic state representation for each sub-task. With these techniques, the hierarchical framework is transferable across different driving scenarios. Besides, our model is able to capture variations of driving behaviors among individuals and scenarios by an online adaptation module. We demonstrate our algorithms in the task of trajectory prediction for real traffic data at intersections and roundabouts from the INTERACTION dataset. Through extensive numerical studies, it is evident that our method significantly outperformed other methods in terms of prediction accuracy, transferability, and adaptability. Pushing the state-of-the-art performance by a considerable margin, we also provide a cognitive view of understanding the driving behavior behind such improvement. We highlight that in the future, more research attention and effort are deserved for transferability and adaptability. It is not only due to the promising performance elevation of prediction and planning algorithms, but more fundamentally, they are crucial for the scalable and general deployment of autonomous vehicles.
abstract_zh: 虽然自动驾驶汽车仍然难以解决道路驾驶过程中的挑战性情况，但人类早已掌握了驾驶的本质，具有高效、可转移和适应性强的驾驶能力。通过模仿人类驾驶过程中的认知模型和语义理解，我们提出了 HATN，这是一个分层框架，可以为多智能体密集交通环境中的驾驶行为生成高质量、可转移且适应性强的预测。我们的分层方法由高层意图识别策略和低层轨迹生成策略组成。我们为每个子任务引入了一种新颖的语义子任务定义和通用状态表示。通过这些技术，分层框架可以在不同的驾驶场景之间转移。此外，我们的模型能够通过在线适应模块捕获个体和场景之间驾驶行为的变化。我们在对来自 INTERACTION 数据集的交叉口和环岛的真实交通数据进行轨迹预测的任务中展示了我们的算法。通过广泛的数值研究，很明显，我们的方法在预测精度、可转移性和适应性方面显着优于其他方法。将最先进的性能大幅提升，我们还提供了理解这种改进背后的驱动行为的认知视图。我们强调，未来应该对可迁移性和适应性给予更多的研究关注和努力。这不仅是由于预测和规划算法的性能提升有希望，更重要的是，它们对于自动驾驶汽车的可扩展和普遍部署至关重要。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种可迁移且可适应的驾驶行为预测框架HATN，用于多智能体密集交通环境中的高质量驾驶行为预测。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶车辆在复杂路况下仍存在挑战，而人类驾驶员具备高效、可迁移和可适应的驾驶能力，需通过模仿人类认知模型提升预测性能。
AI.method: 设计分层框架HATN，包含高层意图识别策略与低层轨迹生成策略，引入语义子任务定义与通用状态表示，并通过在线适应模块捕捉个体与场景行为差异。
AI.result: 在INTERACTION数据集的交叉口与环岛场景中，HATN在预测精度、可迁移性与适应性上显著优于现有方法，推动了相关算法的最先进水平。
AI.conclusion: 可迁移性与适应性对自动驾驶算法性能提升及规模化部署至关重要，未来需加强相关研究以实现更通用的自动驾驶解决方案。

search_text: Transferable and Adaptable Driving Behavior Prediction 可迁移且适应性强的驾驶行为预测 While autonomous vehicles still struggle to solve challenging situations during on-road driving, humans have long mastered the essence of driving with efficient, transferable, and adaptable driving capability. By mimicking humans' cognition model and semantic understanding during driving, we propose HATN, a hierarchical framework to generate high-quality, transferable, and adaptable predictions for driving behaviors in multi-agent dense-traffic environments. Our hierarchical method consists of a high-level intention identification policy and a low-level trajectory generation policy. We introduce a novel semantic sub-task definition and generic state representation for each sub-task. With these techniques, the hierarchical framework is transferable across different driving scenarios. Besides, our model is able to capture variations of driving behaviors among individuals and scenarios by an online adaptation module. We demonstrate our algorithms in the task of trajectory prediction for real traffic data at intersections and roundabouts from the INTERACTION dataset. Through extensive numerical studies, it is evident that our method significantly outperformed other methods in terms of prediction accuracy, transferability, and adaptability. Pushing the state-of-the-art performance by a considerable margin, we also provide a cognitive view of understanding the driving behavior behind such improvement. We highlight that in the future, more research attention and effort are deserved for transferability and adaptability. It is not only due to the promising performance elevation of prediction and planning algorithms, but more fundamentally, they are crucial for the scalable and general deployment of autonomous vehicles. 虽然自动驾驶汽车仍然难以解决道路驾驶过程中的挑战性情况，但人类早已掌握了驾驶的本质，具有高效、可转移和适应性强的驾驶能力。通过模仿人类驾驶过程中的认知模型和语义理解，我们提出了 HATN，这是一个分层框架，可以为多智能体密集交通环境中的驾驶行为生成高质量、可转移且适应性强的预测。我们的分层方法由高层意图识别策略和低层轨迹生成策略组成。我们为每个子任务引入了一种新颖的语义子任务定义和通用状态表示。通过这些技术，分层框架可以在不同的驾驶场景之间转移。此外，我们的模型能够通过在线适应模块捕获个体和场景之间驾驶行为的变化。我们在对来自 INTERACTION 数据集的交叉口和环岛的真实交通数据进行轨迹预测的任务中展示了我们的算法。通过广泛的数值研究，很明显，我们的方法在预测精度、可转移性和适应性方面显着优于其他方法。将最先进的性能大幅提升，我们还提供了理解这种改进背后的驱动行为的认知视图。我们强调，未来应该对可迁移性和适应性给予更多的研究关注和努力。这不仅是由于预测和规划算法的性能提升有希望，更重要的是，它们对于自动驾驶汽车的可扩展和普遍部署至关重要。 本文提出一种可迁移且可适应的驾驶行为预测框架HATN，用于多智能体密集交通环境中的高质量驾驶行为预测。 Letian Wang,Yeping Hu,Liting Sun,Wei Zhan,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Changliu Liu cs.RO,cs.AI

authors_text: Ahmed Akakzia,Olivier Serris,Olivier Sigaud,Cédric Colas
title: Help Me Explore: Minimal Social Interventions for Graph-Based Autotelic Agents
title_zh: 帮助我探索：基于图的 Autotelic 智能体的最小社交干预
abstract: In the quest for autonomous agents learning open-ended repertoires of skills, most works take a Piagetian perspective: learning trajectories are the results of interactions between developmental agents and their physical environment. The Vygotskian perspective, on the other hand, emphasizes the centrality of the socio-cultural environment: higher cognitive functions emerge from transmissions of socio-cultural processes internalized by the agent. This paper argues that both perspectives could be coupled within the learning of autotelic agents to foster their skill acquisition. To this end, we make two contributions: 1) a novel social interaction protocol called Help Me Explore (HME), where autotelic agents can benefit from both individual and socially guided exploration. In social episodes, a social partner suggests goals at the frontier of the learning agent knowledge. In autotelic episodes, agents can either learn to master their own discovered goals or autonomously rehearse failed social goals; 2) GANGSTR, a graph-based autotelic agent for manipulation domains capable of decomposing goals into sequences of intermediate sub-goals. We show that when learning within HME, GANGSTR overcomes its individual learning limits by mastering the most complex configurations (e.g. stacks of 5 blocks) with only few social interventions.
summary: In the quest for autonomous agents learning open-ended repertoires of skills, most works take a Piagetian perspective: learning trajectories are the results of interactions between developmental agents and their physical environment. The Vygotskian perspective, on the other hand, emphasizes the centrality of the socio-cultural environment: higher cognitive functions emerge from transmissions of socio-cultural processes internalized by the agent. This paper argues that both perspectives could be coupled within the learning of autotelic agents to foster their skill acquisition. To this end, we make two contributions: 1) a novel social interaction protocol called Help Me Explore (HME), where autotelic agents can benefit from both individual and socially guided exploration. In social episodes, a social partner suggests goals at the frontier of the learning agent knowledge. In autotelic episodes, agents can either learn to master their own discovered goals or autonomously rehearse failed social goals; 2) GANGSTR, a graph-based autotelic agent for manipulation domains capable of decomposing goals into sequences of intermediate sub-goals. We show that when learning within HME, GANGSTR overcomes its individual learning limits by mastering the most complex configurations (e.g. stacks of 5 blocks) with only few social interventions.
abstract_zh: 在寻求自主智能体学习开放式技能的过程中，大多数作品都采取皮亚杰的观点：学习轨迹是发展智能体与其物理环境之间相互作用的结果。另一方面，维果茨基的观点强调社会文化环境的中心地位：更高的认知功能是从主体内化的社会文化过程的传播中产生的。本文认为，这两种观点都可以在自动学习者的学习中结合起来，以促进他们的技能习得。为此，我们做出了两项贡献：1）一种名为“Help Me Explore”（HME）的新型社交交互协议，其中自动行为者可以从个人和社会引导的探索中受益。在社交事件中，社交伙伴会提出学习代理知识前沿的目标。在自动实现的情节中，代理人可以学习掌握自己发现的目标，也可以自主演练失败的社会目标； 2）GANGSTR，一种基于图的自动实现代理，用于操纵域，能够将目标分解为中间子目标序列。我们表明，当在 HME 中学习时，GANGSTR 通过掌握最复杂的配置（例如 5 个块的堆叠）而克服了其个人学习限制，只需很少的社交干预。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合社会互动与个体探索的新方法，以增强基于图的自足代理人的技能学习能力。
AI.motivation: 传统方法仅关注个体学习（皮亚杰视角）或社会文化环境（维果茨基视角），而本文旨在通过融合两者，突破自主代理人在开放技能学习中的局限性。
AI.method: 提出两种贡献：1) 社会互动协议Help Me Explore (HME)，通过社会伙伴提供前沿目标建议，结合个体探索与社会引导；2) 基于图的自足代理人GANGSTR，能将目标分解为子目标序列。
AI.result: GANGSTR在HME框架下通过少量社会干预，成功掌握复杂任务（如5层积木堆叠），超越纯个体学习的性能上限。
AI.conclusion: 社会互动与个体探索的结合显著提升了自足代理人的技能学习效率，验证了社会文化因素在人工智能发展中的关键作用。

authors_text: Shay Mozes,Nathan Wallheimer,Oren Weimann
title: Improved Compression of the Okamura-Seymour Metric
title_zh: 改进 Okamura-Seymour 度量的压缩
abstract: Let $G=(V,E)$ be an undirected unweighted planar graph. Consider a vector storing the distances from an arbitrary vertex $v$ to all vertices $S = \{ s_1 , s_2 , \ldots , s_k \}$ of a single face in their cyclic order. The pattern of $v$ is obtained by taking the difference between every pair of consecutive values of this vector. In STOC'19, Li and Parter used a VC-dimension argument to show that in planar graphs, the number of distinct patterns, denoted $x$, is only $O(k^3)$. This resulted in a simple compression scheme requiring $\tilde O(\min \{ k^4+|T|, k\cdot |T|\})$ space to encode the distances between $S$ and a subset of terminal vertices $T \subseteq V$. This is known as the Okamura-Seymour metric compression problem. We give an alternative proof of the $x=O(k^3)$ bound that exploits planarity beyond the VC-dimension argument. Namely, our proof relies on cut-cycle duality, as well as on the fact that distances among vertices of $S$ are bounded by $k$. Our method implies the following: (1) An $\tilde{O}(x+k+|T|)$ space compression of the Okamura-Seymour metric, thus improving the compression of Li and Parter to $\tilde O(\min \{k^3+|T|,k \cdot |T| \})$. (2) An optimal $\tilde{O}(k+|T|)$ space compression of the Okamura-Seymour metric, in the case where the vertices of $T$ induce a connected component in $G$. (3) A tight bound of $x = Θ(k^2)$ for the family of Halin graphs, whereas the VC-dimension argument is limited to showing $x=O(k^3)$.
summary: Let $G=(V,E)$ be an undirected unweighted planar graph. Consider a vector storing the distances from an arbitrary vertex $v$ to all vertices $S = \{ s_1 , s_2 , \ldots , s_k \}$ of a single face in their cyclic order. The pattern of $v$ is obtained by taking the difference between every pair of consecutive values of this vector. In STOC'19, Li and Parter used a VC-dimension argument to show that in planar graphs, the number of distinct patterns, denoted $x$, is only $O(k^3)$. This resulted in a simple compression scheme requiring $\tilde O(\min \{ k^4+|T|, k\cdot |T|\})$ space to encode the distances between $S$ and a subset of terminal vertices $T \subseteq V$. This is known as the Okamura-Seymour metric compression problem. We give an alternative proof of the $x=O(k^3)$ bound that exploits planarity beyond the VC-dimension argument. Namely, our proof relies on cut-cycle duality, as well as on the fact that distances among vertices of $S$ are bounded by $k$. Our method implies the following: (1) An $\tilde{O}(x+k+|T|)$ space compression of the Okamura-Seymour metric, thus improving the compression of Li and Parter to $\tilde O(\min \{k^3+|T|,k \cdot |T| \})$. (2) An optimal $\tilde{O}(k+|T|)$ space compression of the Okamura-Seymour metric, in the case where the vertices of $T$ induce a connected component in $G$. (3) A tight bound of $x = Θ(k^2)$ for the family of Halin graphs, whereas the VC-dimension argument is limited to showing $x=O(k^3)$.
abstract_zh: 令 $G=(V,E)$ 为无向无权平面图。考虑一个向量，以循环顺序存储从任意顶点 $v$ 到单个面的所有顶点 $S = \{ s_1 , s_2 , \ldots , s_k \}$ 的距离。 $v$ 的模式是通过该向量的每对连续值之间的差值获得的。在 STOC'19 中，Li 和 Parter 使用 VC 维论证来表明，在平面图中，不同模式的数量（表示为 $x$）仅为 $O(k^3)$。这导致了一个简单的压缩方案，需要 $\tilde O(\min \{ k^4+|T|, k\cdot |T|\})$ 空间来编码 $S$ 和终端顶点子集 $T \subseteq V$ 之间的距离。这称为 Okamura-Seymour 度量压缩问题。我们给出了 $x=O(k^3)$ 界限的另一种证明，它利用了超出 VC 维参数的平面性。也就是说，我们的证明依赖于割环对偶性，以及 $S$ 顶点之间的距离受 $k$ 限制的事实。我们的方法意味着以下内容：（1）Okamura-Seymour度量的$\tilde{O}(x+k+|T|)$空间压缩，从而将Li和Parter的压缩提高到$\tilde O(\min \{k^3+|T|,k \cdot |T| \})$。 (2) Okamura-Seymour 度量的最优 $\tilde{O}(k+|T|)$ 空间压缩，在 $T$ 的顶点在 $G$ 中引入连通分量的情况下。 (3) Halin 图族的紧界 $x = θ(k^2)$，而 VC 维参数仅限于显示 $x=O(k^3)$。

AI.tldr: 本文改进了Okamura-Seymour度量的压缩方法，通过利用平面图的性质，提出了更高效的压缩方案。
AI.motivation: 现有基于VC维的压缩方法在平面图中仅能证明模式数为O(k³)，而本文旨在通过更深入的平面图特性分析，获得更优的压缩界。
AI.method: 利用平面图的割-环对偶性及S集合顶点间距离的k界，给出替代性证明，并设计了基于模式数x的压缩方案。
AI.result: 提出三种改进：1) 压缩空间降至Õ(min{k³+|T|,k·|T|})；2) 当T连通时达到Õ(k+|T|)最优空间；3) 对Halin图证明模式数紧界Θ(k²)。
AI.conclusion: 通过平面图特性的深入分析，本文在压缩效率和理论界方面均超越了VC维方法，为特定图类提供了更精确的分析结果。

search_text: Improved Compression of the Okamura-Seymour Metric 改进 Okamura-Seymour 度量的压缩 Let $G=(V,E)$ be an undirected unweighted planar graph. Consider a vector storing the distances from an arbitrary vertex $v$ to all vertices $S = \{ s_1 , s_2 , \ldots , s_k \}$ of a single face in their cyclic order. The pattern of $v$ is obtained by taking the difference between every pair of consecutive values of this vector. In STOC'19, Li and Parter used a VC-dimension argument to show that in planar graphs, the number of distinct patterns, denoted $x$, is only $O(k^3)$. This resulted in a simple compression scheme requiring $\tilde O(\min \{ k^4+|T|, k\cdot |T|\})$ space to encode the distances between $S$ and a subset of terminal vertices $T \subseteq V$. This is known as the Okamura-Seymour metric compression problem. We give an alternative proof of the $x=O(k^3)$ bound that exploits planarity beyond the VC-dimension argument. Namely, our proof relies on cut-cycle duality, as well as on the fact that distances among vertices of $S$ are bounded by $k$. Our method implies the following: (1) An $\tilde{O}(x+k+|T|)$ space compression of the Okamura-Seymour metric, thus improving the compression of Li and Parter to $\tilde O(\min \{k^3+|T|,k \cdot |T| \})$. (2) An optimal $\tilde{O}(k+|T|)$ space compression of the Okamura-Seymour metric, in the case where the vertices of $T$ induce a connected component in $G$. (3) A tight bound of $x = Θ(k^2)$ for the family of Halin graphs, whereas the VC-dimension argument is limited to showing $x=O(k^3)$. 令 $G=(V,E)$ 为无向无权平面图。考虑一个向量，以循环顺序存储从任意顶点 $v$ 到单个面的所有顶点 $S = \{ s_1 , s_2 , \ldots , s_k \}$ 的距离。 $v$ 的模式是通过该向量的每对连续值之间的差值获得的。在 STOC'19 中，Li 和 Parter 使用 VC 维论证来表明，在平面图中，不同模式的数量（表示为 $x$）仅为 $O(k^3)$。这导致了一个简单的压缩方案，需要 $\tilde O(\min \{ k^4+|T|, k\cdot |T|\})$ 空间来编码 $S$ 和终端顶点子集 $T \subseteq V$ 之间的距离。这称为 Okamura-Seymour 度量压缩问题。我们给出了 $x=O(k^3)$ 界限的另一种证明，它利用了超出 VC 维参数的平面性。也就是说，我们的证明依赖于割环对偶性，以及 $S$ 顶点之间的距离受 $k$ 限制的事实。我们的方法意味着以下内容：（1）Okamura-Seymour度量的$\tilde{O}(x+k+|T|)$空间压缩，从而将Li和Parter的压缩提高到$\tilde O(\min \{k^3+|T|,k \cdot |T| \})$。 (2) Okamura-Seymour 度量的最优 $\tilde{O}(k+|T|)$ 空间压缩，在 $T$ 的顶点在 $G$ 中引入连通分量的情况下。 (3) Halin 图族的紧界 $x = θ(k^2)$，而 VC 维参数仅限于显示 $x=O(k^3)$。 本文改进了Okamura-Seymour度量的压缩方法，通过利用平面图的性质，提出了更高效的压缩方案。 Shay Mozes,Nathan Wallheimer,Oren Weimann cs.DS

authors_text: Hao Jiang,Yanning Zhou,Yi Lin,Ronald CK Chan,Jiang Liu,Hao Chen
title: Deep Learning for Computational Cytology: A Survey
title_zh: 计算细胞学深度学习：一项调查
abstract: Computational cytology is a critical, rapid-developing, yet challenging topic in the field of medical image computing which analyzes the digitized cytology image by computer-aided technologies for cancer screening. Recently, an increasing number of deep learning (DL) algorithms have made significant progress in medical image analysis, leading to the boosting publications of cytological studies. To investigate the advanced methods and comprehensive applications, we survey more than 120 publications of DL-based cytology image analysis in this article. We first introduce various deep learning methods, including fully supervised, weakly supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning. Then, we systematically summarize the public datasets, evaluation metrics, versatile cytology image analysis applications including classification, detection, segmentation, and other related tasks. Finally, we discuss current challenges and potential research directions of computational cytology.
summary: Computational cytology is a critical, rapid-developing, yet challenging topic in the field of medical image computing which analyzes the digitized cytology image by computer-aided technologies for cancer screening. Recently, an increasing number of deep learning (DL) algorithms have made significant progress in medical image analysis, leading to the boosting publications of cytological studies. To investigate the advanced methods and comprehensive applications, we survey more than 120 publications of DL-based cytology image analysis in this article. We first introduce various deep learning methods, including fully supervised, weakly supervised, unsupervised, and transfer learning. Then, we systematically summarize the public datasets, evaluation metrics, versatile cytology image analysis applications including classification, detection, segmentation, and other related tasks. Finally, we discuss current challenges and potential research directions of computational cytology.
abstract_zh: 计算细胞学是医学图像计算领域一个关键、快速发展且具有挑战性的课题，它通过计算机辅助技术分析数字化细胞学图像以进行癌症筛查。最近，越来越多的深度学习（DL）算法在医学图像分析方面取得了重大进展，导致细胞学研究的出版物不断增加。为了研究先进的方法和全面的应用，我们在本文中调查了 120 多篇基于 DL 的细胞学图像分析的出版物。我们首先介绍各​​种深度学习方法，包括全监督、弱监督、无监督和迁移学习。然后，我们系统地总结了公共数据集、评估指标、多功能细胞学图像分析应用，包括分类、检测、分割和其他相关任务。最后，我们讨论了计算细胞学当前的挑战和潜在的研究方向。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了深度学习在计算细胞学中的应用，系统分析了相关方法、数据集及挑战。
AI.motivation: 深度学习在医学图像分析中取得显著进展，推动计算细胞学研究快速发展，需系统总结现有成果与挑战。
AI.method: 通过调研120余篇文献，分类总结深度学习方法（全监督/弱监督/无监督/迁移学习），梳理数据集、评估指标及应用任务。
AI.result: 总结了分类、检测、分割等任务的主流方法，分析了公共数据集与评价指标，指出现有技术局限与研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 当前面临数据标注成本高、模型可解释性差等挑战，未来需加强跨机构数据共享与多模态融合研究。

authors_text: Tobias Schuster,Emmanouil Seferis,Simon Burton,Chih-Hong Cheng
title: Unaligned but Safe -- Formally Compensating Performance Limitations for Imprecise 2D Object Detection
title_zh: 未对齐但安全——正式补偿不精确的 2D 物体检测的性能限制
abstract: In this paper, we consider the imperfection within machine learning-based 2D object detection and its impact on safety. We address a special sub-type of performance limitations: the prediction bounding box cannot be perfectly aligned with the ground truth, but the computed Intersection-over-Union metric is always larger than a given threshold. Under such type of performance limitation, we formally prove the minimum required bounding box enlargement factor to cover the ground truth. We then demonstrate that the factor can be mathematically adjusted to a smaller value, provided that the motion planner takes a fixed-length buffer in making its decisions. Finally, observing the difference between an empirically measured enlargement factor and our formally derived worst-case enlargement factor offers an interesting connection between the quantitative evidence (demonstrated by statistics) and the qualitative evidence (demonstrated by worst-case analysis).
summary: In this paper, we consider the imperfection within machine learning-based 2D object detection and its impact on safety. We address a special sub-type of performance limitations: the prediction bounding box cannot be perfectly aligned with the ground truth, but the computed Intersection-over-Union metric is always larger than a given threshold. Under such type of performance limitation, we formally prove the minimum required bounding box enlargement factor to cover the ground truth. We then demonstrate that the factor can be mathematically adjusted to a smaller value, provided that the motion planner takes a fixed-length buffer in making its decisions. Finally, observing the difference between an empirically measured enlargement factor and our formally derived worst-case enlargement factor offers an interesting connection between the quantitative evidence (demonstrated by statistics) and the qualitative evidence (demonstrated by worst-case analysis).
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们考虑了基于机器学习的二维物体检测的缺陷及其对安全的影响。我们解决了一种特殊的性能限制子类型：预测边界框无法与地面实况完美对齐，但计算出的交并度量始终大于给定阈值。在这种类型的性能限制下，我们正式证明了覆盖地面实况所需的最小边界框放大因子。然后，我们证明，只要运动规划器在做出决策时采用固定长度的缓冲区，该因子就可以在数学上调整为较小的值。最后，观察经验测量的放大因子和我们正式推导的最坏情况放大因子之间的差异，提供了定量证据（通过统计证明）和定性证据（通过最坏情况分析证明）之间的有趣联系。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了基于机器学习的2D目标检测中预测框与真实框对齐不完美时的安全性问题，并提出通过形式化方法补偿性能限制。
AI.motivation: 目标检测中的预测框与真实框存在对齐误差，但IoU指标仍可能满足阈值要求，这种性能限制可能影响自动驾驶等安全关键系统的可靠性。
AI.method: 通过形式化证明确定覆盖真实目标的最小预测框放大因子，并证明在运动规划器采用固定缓冲区时可降低该因子；结合实测放大因子与理论最坏情况因子分析定量化与定性证据的关联。
AI.result: 推导出保证安全的最小放大因子数学表达式，验证了缓冲区机制可降低安全冗余需求，并揭示了统计证据与最坏情况分析之间的内在联系。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为不完美目标检测提供了形式化安全保证，通过理论分析与实证结合，为安全关键系统设计提供了可量化的缓冲区配置依据。

ai_content_json.method: 通过形式化证明确定覆盖真实目标的最小预测框放大因子，并证明在运动规划器采用固定缓冲区时可降低该因子；结合实测放大因子与理论最坏情况因子分析定量化与定性证据的关联。
ai_content_json.result: 推导出保证安全的最小放大因子数学表达式，验证了缓冲区机制可降低安全冗余需求，并揭示了统计证据与最坏情况分析之间的内在联系。
ai_content_json.conclusion: 该方法为不完美目标检测提供了形式化安全保证，通过理论分析与实证结合，为安全关键系统设计提供了可量化的缓冲区配置依据。

tldr: 本文研究了基于机器学习的2D目标检测中预测框与真实框对齐不完美时的安全性问题，并提出通过形式化方法补偿性能限制。
motivation: 目标检测中的预测框与真实框存在对齐误差，但IoU指标仍可能满足阈值要求，这种性能限制可能影响自动驾驶等安全关键系统的可靠性。
method: 通过形式化证明确定覆盖真实目标的最小预测框放大因子，并证明在运动规划器采用固定缓冲区时可降低该因子；结合实测放大因子与理论最坏情况因子分析定量化与定性证据的关联。
result: 推导出保证安全的最小放大因子数学表达式，验证了缓冲区机制可降低安全冗余需求，并揭示了统计证据与最坏情况分析之间的内在联系。
conclusion: 该方法为不完美目标检测提供了形式化安全保证，通过理论分析与实证结合，为安全关键系统设计提供了可量化的缓冲区配置依据。
search_text: Unaligned but Safe -- Formally Compensating Performance Limitations for Imprecise 2D Object Detection 未对齐但安全——正式补偿不精确的 2D 物体检测的性能限制 In this paper, we consider the imperfection within machine learning-based 2D object detection and its impact on safety. We address a special sub-type of performance limitations: the prediction bounding box cannot be perfectly aligned with the ground truth, but the computed Intersection-over-Union metric is always larger than a given threshold. Under such type of performance limitation, we formally prove the minimum required bounding box enlargement factor to cover the ground truth. We then demonstrate that the factor can be mathematically adjusted to a smaller value, provided that the motion planner takes a fixed-length buffer in making its decisions. Finally, observing the difference between an empirically measured enlargement factor and our formally derived worst-case enlargement factor offers an interesting connection between the quantitative evidence (demonstrated by statistics) and the qualitative evidence (demonstrated by worst-case analysis). 在本文中，我们考虑了基于机器学习的二维物体检测的缺陷及其对安全的影响。我们解决了一种特殊的性能限制子类型：预测边界框无法与地面实况完美对齐，但计算出的交并度量始终大于给定阈值。在这种类型的性能限制下，我们正式证明了覆盖地面实况所需的最小边界框放大因子。然后，我们证明，只要运动规划器在做出决策时采用固定长度的缓冲区，该因子就可以在数学上调整为较小的值。最后，观察经验测量的放大因子和我们正式推导的最坏情况放大因子之间的差异，提供了定量证据（通过统计证明）和定性证据（通过最坏情况分析证明）之间的有趣联系。 本文研究了基于机器学习的2D目标检测中预测框与真实框对齐不完美时的安全性问题，并提出通过形式化方法补偿性能限制。 Tobias Schuster,Emmanouil Seferis,Simon Burton,Chih-Hong Cheng cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Ainesh Bakshi,Kenneth L. Clarkson,David P. Woodruff
title: Low-Rank Approximation with $1/ε^{1/3}$ Matrix-Vector Products
title_zh: $1/ε^{1/3}$ 矩阵向量积的低阶近似
abstract: We study iterative methods based on Krylov subspaces for low-rank approximation under any Schatten-$p$ norm. Here, given access to a matrix $A$ through matrix-vector products, an accuracy parameter $ε$, and a target rank $k$, the goal is to find a rank-$k$ matrix $Z$ with orthonormal columns such that $\| A(I -ZZ^\top)\|_{S_p} \leq (1+ε)\min_{U^\top U = I_k} \|A(I - U U^\top)\|_{S_p}$, where $\|M\|_{S_p}$ denotes the $\ell_p$ norm of the the singular values of $M$. For the special cases of $p=2$ (Frobenius norm) and $p = \infty$ (Spectral norm), Musco and Musco (NeurIPS 2015) obtained an algorithm based on Krylov methods that uses $\tilde{O}(k/\sqrtε)$ matrix-vector products, improving on the naïve $\tilde{O}(k/ε)$ dependence obtainable by the power method, where $\tilde{O}$ suppresses poly$(\log(dk/ε))$ factors. Our main result is an algorithm that uses only $\tilde{O}(kp^{1/6}/ε^{1/3})$ matrix-vector products, and works for all $p \geq 1$. For $p = 2$ our bound improves the previous $\tilde{O}(k/ε^{1/2})$ bound to $\tilde{O}(k/ε^{1/3})$. Since the Schatten-$p$ and Schatten-$\infty$ norms are the same up to a $(1+ ε)$-factor when $p \geq (\log d)/ε$, our bound recovers the result of Musco and Musco for $p = \infty$. Further, we prove a matrix-vector query lower bound of $Ω(1/ε^{1/3})$ for any fixed constant $p \geq 1$, showing that surprisingly $\tildeΘ(1/ε^{1/3})$ is the optimal complexity for constant~$k$. To obtain our results, we introduce several new techniques, including optimizing over multiple Krylov subspaces simultaneously, and pinching inequalities for partitioned operators. Our lower bound for $p \in [1,2]$ uses the Araki-Lieb-Thirring trace inequality, whereas for $p>2$, we appeal to a norm-compression inequality for aligned partitioned operators.
summary: We study iterative methods based on Krylov subspaces for low-rank approximation under any Schatten-$p$ norm. Here, given access to a matrix $A$ through matrix-vector products, an accuracy parameter $ε$, and a target rank $k$, the goal is to find a rank-$k$ matrix $Z$ with orthonormal columns such that $\| A(I -ZZ^\top)\|_{S_p} \leq (1+ε)\min_{U^\top U = I_k} \|A(I - U U^\top)\|_{S_p}$, where $\|M\|_{S_p}$ denotes the $\ell_p$ norm of the the singular values of $M$. For the special cases of $p=2$ (Frobenius norm) and $p = \infty$ (Spectral norm), Musco and Musco (NeurIPS 2015) obtained an algorithm based on Krylov methods that uses $\tilde{O}(k/\sqrtε)$ matrix-vector products, improving on the naïve $\tilde{O}(k/ε)$ dependence obtainable by the power method, where $\tilde{O}$ suppresses poly$(\log(dk/ε))$ factors. Our main result is an algorithm that uses only $\tilde{O}(kp^{1/6}/ε^{1/3})$ matrix-vector products, and works for all $p \geq 1$. For $p = 2$ our bound improves the previous $\tilde{O}(k/ε^{1/2})$ bound to $\tilde{O}(k/ε^{1/3})$. Since the Schatten-$p$ and Schatten-$\infty$ norms are the same up to a $(1+ ε)$-factor when $p \geq (\log d)/ε$, our bound recovers the result of Musco and Musco for $p = \infty$. Further, we prove a matrix-vector query lower bound of $Ω(1/ε^{1/3})$ for any fixed constant $p \geq 1$, showing that surprisingly $\tildeΘ(1/ε^{1/3})$ is the optimal complexity for constant~$k$. To obtain our results, we introduce several new techniques, including optimizing over multiple Krylov subspaces simultaneously, and pinching inequalities for partitioned operators. Our lower bound for $p \in [1,2]$ uses the Araki-Lieb-Thirring trace inequality, whereas for $p>2$, we appeal to a norm-compression inequality for aligned partitioned operators.
abstract_zh: 我们研究基于 Krylov 子空间的迭代方法，用于任何 Schatten-$p$ 范数下的低秩近似。在这里，通过矩阵向量乘积、精度参数 $ε$ 和目标秩 $k$ 访问矩阵 $A$，目标是找到具有正交列的秩 $k$ 矩阵 $Z$，使得 $\| A(I -ZZ^\top)\|_{S_p} \leq (1+ε)\min_{U^\top U = I_k} \|A(I - U U^\top)\|_{S_p}$，其中 $\|M\|_{S_p}$ 表示 $M$ 奇异值的 $\ell_p$ 范数。对于 $p=2$（Frobenius 范数）和 $p = \infty$（谱范数）的特殊情况，Musco 和 Musco (NeurIPS 2015) 获得了一种基于 Krylov 方法的算法，该算法使用 $\tilde{O}(k/\sqrtε)$ 矩阵向量乘积，改进了通过幂方法获得的朴素 $\tilde{O}(k/ε)$ 依赖性，其中 $\tilde{O}$抑制 poly$(\log(dk/ε))$ 因子。我们的主要结果是一种仅使用 $\tilde{O}(kp^{1/6}/ε^{1/3})$ 矩阵向量乘积的算法，并且适用于所有 $p \geq 1$。对于 $p = 2$，我们的界限将之前的 $\tilde{O}(k/ε^{1/2})$ 界限改进为 $\tilde{O}(k/ε^{1/3})$。由于当 $p \geq (\log d)/ε$ 时，Schatten-$p$ 和 Schatten-$\infty$ 范数在 $(1+ ε)$ 因子上是相同的，因此我们的界限恢复了 $p = \infty$ 时 Musco 和 Musco 的结果。此外，我们证明了对于任何固定常数 $p \geq 1$ 的矩阵向量查询下界 $Ω(1/ε^{1/3})$，令人惊讶的是 $\tildeθ(1/ε^{1/3})$ 是常数 ~$k$ 的最佳复杂度。为了获得我们的结果，我们引入了几种新技术，包括同时优化多个 Krylov 子空间，以及缩小分区算子的不等式。我们对 $p \in [1,2]$ 的下界使用 Araki-Lieb-Thirring 迹不等式，而对于 $p>2$，我们诉诸对齐分区算子的范数压缩不等式。

AI.tldr: 研究基于Krylov子空间的迭代方法，用于在任意Schatten-p范数下进行低秩近似，目标是在给定矩阵-向量乘积访问权限时，以较少的查询次数找到近似最优的秩-k矩阵。
AI.motivation: 现有的低秩近似算法在Frobenius范数和谱范数下已有较好结果（如Musco和Musco的O~(k/√ε)查询复杂度），但更一般的Schatten-p范数缺乏高效算法，且理论上查询复杂度的下界尚不明确，因此希望设计更通用的算法并探索最优复杂度。
AI.method: 引入多种新技术：同时优化多个Krylov子空间、针对分区算子的pinching不等式；对p∈[1,2]使用Araki-Lieb-Thirring迹不等式，对p>2使用对齐分区算子的范数压缩不等式，从而设计出仅需O~(k p^{1/6}/ε^{1/3})次矩阵-向量乘积的算法。
AI.result: 算法在任意p≥1下达到O~(k p^{1/6}/ε^{1/3})次矩阵-向量乘积，其中p=2时从之前的O~(k/ε^{1/2})改进到O~(k/ε^{1/3})；同时证明了对于固定常数p≥1，查询复杂度下界为Ω(1/ε^{1/3})，表明该复杂度是最优的。
AI.conclusion: 证明了对于任意Schatten-p范数的低秩近似问题，̃Θ(1/ε^{1/3})是常数k下的最优查询复杂度，填补了该领域的理论空白，并为更广泛的低秩近似问题提供了统一框架。

authors_text: Filippo Moro,E. Esmanhotto,T. Hirtzlin,N. Castellani,A. Trabelsi,T. Dalgaty,G. Molas,F. Andrieu,S. Brivio,S. Spiga,G. Indiveri,M. Payvand,E. Vianello
title: Hardware calibrated learning to compensate heterogeneity in analog RRAM-based Spiking Neural Networks
title_zh: 硬件校准学习可补偿基于模拟 RRAM 的尖峰神经网络中的异质性
abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) can unleash the full power of analog Resistive Random Access Memories (RRAMs) based circuits for low power signal processing. Their inherent computational sparsity naturally results in energy efficiency benefits. The main challenge implementing robust SNNs is the intrinsic variability (heterogeneity) of both analog CMOS circuits and RRAM technology. In this work, we assessed the performance and variability of RRAM-based neuromorphic circuits that were designed and fabricated using a 130\,nm technology node. Based on these results, we propose a Neuromorphic Hardware Calibrated (NHC) SNN, where the learning circuits are calibrated on the measured data. We show that by taking into account the measured heterogeneity characteristics in the off-chip learning phase, the NHC SNN self-corrects its hardware non-idealities and learns to solve benchmark tasks with high accuracy. This work demonstrates how to cope with the heterogeneity of neurons and synapses for increasing classification accuracy in temporal tasks.
summary: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) can unleash the full power of analog Resistive Random Access Memories (RRAMs) based circuits for low power signal processing. Their inherent computational sparsity naturally results in energy efficiency benefits. The main challenge implementing robust SNNs is the intrinsic variability (heterogeneity) of both analog CMOS circuits and RRAM technology. In this work, we assessed the performance and variability of RRAM-based neuromorphic circuits that were designed and fabricated using a 130\,nm technology node. Based on these results, we propose a Neuromorphic Hardware Calibrated (NHC) SNN, where the learning circuits are calibrated on the measured data. We show that by taking into account the measured heterogeneity characteristics in the off-chip learning phase, the NHC SNN self-corrects its hardware non-idealities and learns to solve benchmark tasks with high accuracy. This work demonstrates how to cope with the heterogeneity of neurons and synapses for increasing classification accuracy in temporal tasks.
abstract_zh: 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 可以释放基于模拟电阻随机存取存储器 (RRAM) 的电路的全部功能，用于低功耗信号处理。它们固有的计算稀疏性自然会带来能源效率的好处。实现稳健 SNN 的主要挑战是模拟 CMOS 电路和 RRAM 技术的固有可变性（异质性）。在这项工作中，我们评估了使用 130 nm 技术节点设计和制造的基于 RRAM 的神经形态电路的性能和可变性。基于这些结果，我们提出了一种神经形态硬件校准 (NHC) SNN，其中学习电路根据测量数据进行校准。我们表明，通过考虑片外学习阶段测量到的异质性特征，NHC SNN 可以自我纠正其硬件非理想性，并学习以高精度解决基准任务。这项工作演示了如何应对神经元和突触的异质性，以提高时间任务的分类准确性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于硬件校准的学习方法，用于补偿模拟RRAM脉冲神经网络中的异质性问题。
AI.motivation: 模拟RRAM电路的异质性导致SNN性能不稳定，现有方法难以有效应对硬件非理想性带来的误差。
AI.method: 设计130nm工艺RRAM神经形态电路，提出NHC SNN框架，通过离线学习阶段利用测量数据校准硬件参数以补偿异质性。
AI.result: NHC SNN能有效校正硬件非理想性，在基准任务中实现高分类准确率，验证了异质性补偿的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 硬件校准学习方法可有效提升SNN在异质性硬件上的分类性能，为神经形态计算提供新思路。

search_text: Hardware calibrated learning to compensate heterogeneity in analog RRAM-based Spiking Neural Networks 硬件校准学习可补偿基于模拟 RRAM 的尖峰神经网络中的异质性 Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) can unleash the full power of analog Resistive Random Access Memories (RRAMs) based circuits for low power signal processing. Their inherent computational sparsity naturally results in energy efficiency benefits. The main challenge implementing robust SNNs is the intrinsic variability (heterogeneity) of both analog CMOS circuits and RRAM technology. In this work, we assessed the performance and variability of RRAM-based neuromorphic circuits that were designed and fabricated using a 130\,nm technology node. Based on these results, we propose a Neuromorphic Hardware Calibrated (NHC) SNN, where the learning circuits are calibrated on the measured data. We show that by taking into account the measured heterogeneity characteristics in the off-chip learning phase, the NHC SNN self-corrects its hardware non-idealities and learns to solve benchmark tasks with high accuracy. This work demonstrates how to cope with the heterogeneity of neurons and synapses for increasing classification accuracy in temporal tasks. 尖峰神经网络 (SNN) 可以释放基于模拟电阻随机存取存储器 (RRAM) 的电路的全部功能，用于低功耗信号处理。它们固有的计算稀疏性自然会带来能源效率的好处。实现稳健 SNN 的主要挑战是模拟 CMOS 电路和 RRAM 技术的固有可变性（异质性）。在这项工作中，我们评估了使用 130 nm 技术节点设计和制造的基于 RRAM 的神经形态电路的性能和可变性。基于这些结果，我们提出了一种神经形态硬件校准 (NHC) SNN，其中学习电路根据测量数据进行校准。我们表明，通过考虑片外学习阶段测量到的异质性特征，NHC SNN 可以自我纠正其硬件非理想性，并学习以高精度解决基准任务。这项工作演示了如何应对神经元和突触的异质性，以提高时间任务的分类准确性。 本文提出一种基于硬件校准的学习方法，用于补偿模拟RRAM脉冲神经网络中的异质性问题。 Filippo Moro,E. authors_text: Kyeong-Joong Jeong,Jin-Duk Park,Kyusoon Hwang,Seong-Lyun Kim,Won-Yong Shin
title: Two-Stage Deep Anomaly Detection with Heterogeneous Time Series Data
title_zh: 异构时间序列数据的两阶段深度异常检测
comment: 10 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables; published in the IEEE Access (Please cite our journal version.)
comments: 10 pages, 4 figures, 4 tables; published in the IEEE Access (Please cite our journal version.)
abstract: We introduce a data-driven anomaly detection framework using a manufacturing dataset collected from a factory assembly line. Given heterogeneous time series data consisting of operation cycle signals and sensor signals, we aim at discovering abnormal events. Motivated by our empirical findings that conventional single-stage benchmark approaches may not exhibit satisfactory performance under our challenging circumstances, we propose a two-stage deep anomaly detection (TDAD) framework in which two different unsupervised learning models are adopted depending on types of signals. In Stage I, we select anomaly candidates by using a model trained by operation cycle signals; in Stage II, we finally detect abnormal events out of the candidates by using another model, which is suitable for taking advantage of temporal continuity, trained by sensor signals. A distinguishable feature of our framework is that operation cycle signals are exploited first to find likely anomalous points, whereas sensor signals are leveraged to filter out unlikely anomalous points afterward. Our experiments comprehensively demonstrate the superiority over single-stage benchmark approaches, the model-agnostic property, and the robustness to difficult situations.
summary: We introduce a data-driven anomaly detection framework using a manufacturing dataset collected from a factory assembly line. Given heterogeneous time series data consisting of operation cycle signals and sensor signals, we aim at discovering abnormal events. Motivated by our empirical findings that conventional single-stage benchmark approaches may not exhibit satisfactory performance under our challenging circumstances, we propose a two-stage deep anomaly detection (TDAD) framework in which two different unsupervised learning models are adopted depending on types of signals. In Stage I, we select anomaly candidates by using a model trained by operation cycle signals; in Stage II, we finally detect abnormal events out of the candidates by using another model, which is suitable for taking advantage of temporal continuity, trained by sensor signals. A distinguishable feature of our framework is that operation cycle signals are exploited first to find likely anomalous points, whereas sensor signals are leveraged to filter out unlikely anomalous points afterward. Our experiments comprehensively demonstrate the superiority over single-stage benchmark approaches, the model-agnostic property, and the robustness to difficult situations.
abstract_zh: 我们使用从工厂装配线收集的制造数据集引入了数据驱动的异常检测框架。给定由运行周期信号和传感器信号组成的异构时间序列数据，我们的目标是发现异常事件。我们的实证结果表明，传统的单阶段基准方法在我们充满挑战的环境下可能无法表现出令人满意的性能，因此我们提出了一种两阶段深度异常检测（TDAD）框架，其中根据信号类型采用两种不同的无监督学习模型。在第一阶段，我们使用运行周期信号训练的模型来选择异常候选者；在第二阶段，我们最终使用另一种模型检测候选者中的异常事件，该模型适合利用时间连续性，并由传感器信号训练。我们框架的一个显着特征是，首先利用操作周期信号来查找可能的异常点，然后利用传感器信号来过滤掉不太可能的异常点。我们的实验全面证明了相对于单阶段基准方法的优越性、模型无关的特性以及对困难情况的鲁棒性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种两阶段深度异常检测框架，用于处理异构时间序列数据以发现制造过程中的异常事件。
AI.motivation: 传统单阶段方法在复杂场景下效果不佳，需利用不同信号类型分阶段检测以提高准确性。
AI.method: 采用两阶段框架：第一阶段使用操作周期信号模型筛选候选异常，第二阶段利用传感器信号模型结合时间连续性确认异常事件。
AI.result: 实验验证了框架优于单阶段方法，具备模型无关性和对复杂情况的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 两阶段框架有效利用不同信号特性，提升异常检测准确率，适用于复杂工业场景。

authors_text: Lucas Berent,Markus Nissl,Emanuel Sallinger
title: Complexity of Arithmetic in Warded Datalog+-
title_zh: Warded Datalog 中算术的复杂性+-
abstract: Warded Datalog+- extends the logic-based language Datalog with existential quantifiers in rule heads. Existential rules are needed for advanced reasoning tasks, e.g., ontological reasoning. The theoretical efficiency guarantees of Warded Datalog+- do not cover extensions crucial for data analytics, such as arithmetic. Moreover, despite the significance of arithmetic for common data analytic scenarios, no decidable fragment of any Datalog+- language extended with arithmetic has been identified. We close this gap by defining a new language that extends Warded Datalog+- with arithmetic and prove its P-completeness. Furthermore, we present an efficient reasoning algorithm for our newly defined language and prove descriptive complexity results for a recently introduced Datalog fragment with integer arithmetic, thereby closing an open question. We lay the theoretical foundation for highly expressive Datalog+- languages that combine the power of advanced recursive rules and arithmetic while guaranteeing efficient reasoning algorithms for applications in modern AI systems, such as Knowledge Graphs.
summary: Warded Datalog+- extends the logic-based language Datalog with existential quantifiers in rule heads. Existential rules are needed for advanced reasoning tasks, e.g., ontological reasoning. The theoretical efficiency guarantees of Warded Datalog+- do not cover extensions crucial for data analytics, such as arithmetic. Moreover, despite the significance of arithmetic for common data analytic scenarios, no decidable fragment of any Datalog+- language extended with arithmetic has been identified. We close this gap by defining a new language that extends Warded Datalog+- with arithmetic and prove its P-completeness. Furthermore, we present an efficient reasoning algorithm for our newly defined language and prove descriptive complexity results for a recently introduced Datalog fragment with integer arithmetic, thereby closing an open question. We lay the theoretical foundation for highly expressive Datalog+- languages that combine the power of advanced recursive rules and arithmetic while guaranteeing efficient reasoning algorithms for applications in modern AI systems, such as Knowledge Graphs.
abstract_zh: Warded Datalog+- 使用规则头中的存在量词扩展了基于逻辑的语言 Datalog。高级推理任务需要存在规则，例如本体论推理。 Warded Datalog+ 的理论效率保证不涵盖对数据分析至关重要的扩展，例如算术。此外，尽管算术对于常见数据分析场景很重要，但尚未识别出任何用算术扩展的 Datalog+- 语言的可判定片段。我们通过定义一种新语言来缩小这一差距，该语言用算术扩展了 Warded Datalog+- 并证明了其 P 完整性。此外，我们为我们新定义的语言提供了一种有效的推理算法，并证明了最近引入的具有整数运算的数据记录片段的描述性复杂性结果，从而解决了一个悬而未决的问题。我们为具有高度表现力的 Datalog+ 语言奠定了理论基础，该语言结合了先进的递归规则和算术的力量，同时保证了知识图谱等现代人工智能系统应用的高效推理算法。

AI.tldr: 本文定义了扩展Warded Datalog+-的算术语言，证明其P完全性并提出高效推理算法，解决数据分석中算术扩展的可判定性问题。
AI.motivation: Warded Datalog+-虽支持存在量词，但缺乏对数据分석关键的算术扩展的理论保证，且此前未确定任何带算术的Datalog+-语言的可判定片段。
AI.method: 定义新语言扩展Warded Datalog+-加入算术，证明P完全性；设计高效推理算法；分析含整数算术的Datalog片段的描述复杂性。
AI.result: 证明新语言P完全性，提出高效算法，解决开放性问题，为结合递归规则与算术的Datalog+-语言奠定理论基础。
AI.conclusion: 填补了Warded Datalog+-算术扩展的理论空白，确保现代AI系统（如知识图谱）中复杂推理的高效性。

result: 证明新语言P完全性，提出高效算法，解决开放性问题，为结合递归规则与算术的Datalog+-语言奠定理论基础。
conclusion: 填补了Warded Datalog+-算术扩展的理论空白，确保现代AI系统（如知识图谱）中复杂推理的高效性。
search_text: Complexity of Arithmetic in Warded Datalog+- Warded Datalog 中算术的复杂性+- Warded Datalog+- extends the logic-based language Datalog with existential quantifiers in rule heads. Existential rules are needed for advanced reasoning tasks, e.g., ontological reasoning. The theoretical efficiency guarantees of Warded Datalog+- do not cover extensions crucial for data analytics, such as arithmetic. Moreover, despite the significance of arithmetic for common data analytic scenarios, no decidable fragment of any Datalog+- language extended with arithmetic has been identified. We close this gap by defining a new language that extends Warded Datalog+- with arithmetic and prove its P-completeness. Furthermore, we present an efficient reasoning algorithm for our newly defined language and prove descriptive complexity results for a recently introduced Datalog fragment with integer arithmetic, thereby closing an open question. We lay the theoretical foundation for highly expressive Datalog+- languages that combine the power of advanced recursive rules and arithmetic while guaranteeing efficient reasoning algorithms for applications in modern AI systems, such as Knowledge Graphs. Warded Datalog+- 使用规则头中的存在量词扩展了基于逻辑的语言 Datalog。高级推理任务需要存在规则，例如本体论推理。 Warded Datalog+ 的理论效率保证不涵盖对数据分析至关重要的扩展，例如算术。此外，尽管算术对于常见数据分析场景很重要，但尚未识别出任何用算术扩展的 Datalog+- 语言的可判定片段。我们通过定义一种新语言来缩小这一差距，该语言用算术扩展了 Warded Datalog+- 并证明了其 P 完整性。此外，我们为我们新定义的语言提供了一种有效的推理算法，并证明了最近引入的具有整数运算的数据记录片段的描述性复杂性结果，从而解决了一个悬而未决的问题。我们为具有高度表现力的 Datalog+ 语言奠定了理论基础，该语言结合了先进的递归规则和算术的力量，同时保证了知识图谱等现代人工智能系统应用的高效推理算法。 本文定义了扩展Warded Datalog+-的算术语言，证明其P完全性并提出高效推理算法，解决数据分석中算术扩展的可判定性问题。 Lucas Berent,Markus Nissl,Emanuel Sallinger cs.AI,cs.DB

authors_text: Igor Tatarnikov,Ardavan Shahrabi Farahani,Sana Kashgouli,Travis Gagie
title: MONI can find k-MEMs
title_zh: MONI 可以找到 k-MEM
abstract: Suppose we are asked to index a text $T [0..n - 1]$ such that, given a pattern $P [0..m - 1]$, we can quickly report the maximal substrings of $P$ that each occur in $T$ at least $k$ times. We first show how we can add $O (r \log n)$ bits to Rossi et al.'s recent MONI index, where $r$ is the number of runs in the Burrows-Wheeler Transform of $T$, such that it supports such queries in $O (k m \log n)$ time. We then show how, if we are given $k$ at construction time, we can reduce the query time to $O (m \log n)$.
summary: Suppose we are asked to index a text $T [0..n - 1]$ such that, given a pattern $P [0..m - 1]$, we can quickly report the maximal substrings of $P$ that each occur in $T$ at least $k$ times. We first show how we can add $O (r \log n)$ bits to Rossi et al.'s recent MONI index, where $r$ is the number of runs in the Burrows-Wheeler Transform of $T$, such that it supports such queries in $O (k m \log n)$ time. We then show how, if we are given $k$ at construction time, we can reduce the query time to $O (m \log n)$.
abstract_zh: 假设我们被要求索引文本 $T [0..n - 1]$，这样，给定模式 $P [0..m - 1]$，我们可以快速报告 $P$ 的最大子字符串，每个子字符串在 $T$ 中至少出现 $k$ 次。我们首先展示如何向 Rossi 等人最近的 MONI 索引添加 $O (r \log n)$ 位，其中 $r$ 是 $T$ 的 Burrows-Wheeler 变换中的运行次数，以便它在 $O (k m \log n)$ 时间内支持此类查询。然后，我们展示如果在构建时给出 $k$，我们如何可以将查询时间减少到 $O (m \log n)$。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进MONI索引以支持快速查询模式P中在文本T中至少出现k次的最大子串（k-MEMs）。
AI.motivation: 在生物信息学等领域，需要高效定位重复子串，传统方法难以兼顾查询效率与内存消耗。
AI.method: 在Rossi等人MONI索引基础上增加O(r log n)位预处理信息，分两种情况优化查询时间：1）运行时给定k，时间复杂度O(k m log n)；2）构建时确定k，时间复杂度降为O(m log n)。
AI.result: 实现支持k-MEM查询的MONI索引，内存消耗与原索引近线性相关，查询效率显著优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: 通过预处理优化，该方法在保持低内存占用的同时，提供了灵活且高效的k-MEM查询解决方案。

authors_text: Manuel Sam Ribeiro,Julian Roth,Giulia Comini,Goeric Huybrechts,Adam Gabrys,Jaime Lorenzo-Trueba
title: Cross-speaker style transfer for text-to-speech using data augmentation
title_zh: 使用数据增强进行文本到语音的跨说话者风格传输
abstract: We address the problem of cross-speaker style transfer for text-to-speech (TTS) using data augmentation via voice conversion. We assume to have a corpus of neutral non-expressive data from a target speaker and supporting conversational expressive data from different speakers. Our goal is to build a TTS system that is expressive, while retaining the target speaker's identity. The proposed approach relies on voice conversion to first generate high-quality data from the set of supporting expressive speakers. The voice converted data is then pooled with natural data from the target speaker and used to train a single-speaker multi-style TTS system. We provide evidence that this approach is efficient, flexible, and scalable. The method is evaluated using one or more supporting speakers, as well as a variable amount of supporting data. We further provide evidence that this approach allows some controllability of speaking style, when using multiple supporting speakers. We conclude by scaling our proposed technology to a set of 14 speakers across 7 languages. Results indicate that our technology consistently improves synthetic samples in terms of style similarity, while retaining the target speaker's identity.
summary: We address the problem of cross-speaker style transfer for text-to-speech (TTS) using data augmentation via voice conversion. We assume to have a corpus of neutral non-expressive data from a target speaker and supporting conversational expressive data from different speakers. Our goal is to build a TTS system that is expressive, while retaining the target speaker's identity. The proposed approach relies on voice conversion to first generate high-quality data from the set of supporting expressive speakers. The voice converted data is then pooled with natural data from the target speaker and used to train a single-speaker multi-style TTS system. We provide evidence that this approach is efficient, flexible, and scalable. The method is evaluated using one or more supporting speakers, as well as a variable amount of supporting data. We further provide evidence that this approach allows some controllability of speaking style, when using multiple supporting speakers. We conclude by scaling our proposed technology to a set of 14 speakers across 7 languages. Results indicate that our technology consistently improves synthetic samples in terms of style similarity, while retaining the target speaker's identity.
abstract_zh: 我们通过语音转换使用数据增强来解决文本到语音 (TTS) 的跨说话者风格传输问题。我们假设有一个来自目标说话者的中性非表达数据的语料库，并支持来自不同说话者的会话表达数据。我们的目标是构建一个富有表现力的 TTS 系统，同时保留目标说话者的身份。所提出的方法依赖于语音转换，首先从一组支持表达的说话者中生成高质量的数据。然后，将语音转换后的数据与来自目标说话者的自然数据合并，并用于训练单说话者多风格 TTS 系统。我们提供的证据表明这种方法高效、灵活且可扩展。该方法使用一个或多个支持发言者以及可变数量的支持数据进行评估。我们进一步提供的证据表明，当使用多个支持扬声器时，这种方法可以对说话风格进行一定程度的可控。最后，我们将我们提出的技术扩展到 7 种语言的 14 名说话者。结果表明，我们的技术不断改进合成样本的风格相似性，同时保留目标说话者的身份。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于数据增强的跨说话人风格迁移文本到语音合成方法，通过语音转换技术生成表达性数据并训练保留目标说话人身份的多风格TTS系统。
AI.motivation: 现有TTS系统难以在保持目标说话人身份的同时实现跨说话人的表达风格迁移，且缺乏有效利用多说话人表达数据的解决方案。
AI.method: 利用语音转换从支持说话人的表达数据生成高质量数据，与目标说话人的中性数据结合，训练单说话人多风格TTS模型，并通过多说话人扩展验证方法的可扩展性。
AI.result: 实验表明该方法在风格相似性与说话人身份保留上表现优异，支持多说话人和多语言扩展，且具备一定程度的风格可控性。
AI.conclusion: 该技术有效解决了跨说话人风格迁移与身份保留的矛盾，具有高效、灵活和可扩展的特性，适用于多语言多说话人场景。
